news.Title: з„Ұй»һжқҝеЎҠ1иЎЁзңӢгҖӢеҸ°иӮЎе·ЁйңҮеҙ©и·Ң1077й»һ йҹ“иӮЎзҶ”ж–·еј•зҲҶдәһиӮЎжҒҗж…Ң гҖҢйҖҷжқҝеЎҠгҖҚйҖҶеӢўеҗёйҮ‘
news.Content:
еҸ°иӮЎд»ҠпјҲ7ж—ҘпјүйҒӯйҒҮеҠҮзғҲйңҮзӣӘпјҢеҸ—еҲ°еҚ—йҹ“иӮЎеёӮйҮҚжҢ«дёҰи§ёзҷјзҶ”ж–·ж©ҹеҲ¶еҪұйҹҝпјҢеёӮе ҙжҒҗж…Ңжғ…з·’иҝ…йҖҹж“ҙж•ЈиҮідәһжҙІиӮЎеёӮпјҢеё¶еӢ•еҸ°иӮЎдёҠжј”гҖҢеӨҡж®әеӨҡгҖҚжҖҘж®әиЎҢжғ…гҖӮеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёж—©зӣӨдёҖеәҰеӨ§жјІиҝ‘400й»һпјҢй«ҳиҰӢ46,967.04й»һпјҢдҪҶйҡЁеҫҢз§‘жҠҖиӮЎжӢӢе”®жҪ®е…Ёйқўж№§зҸҫпјҢжҢҮж•ёжҖҘиҪүзӣҙдёӢпјҢзӣӨдёӯжңҖдҪҺи§ёеҸҠ45,432.02й»һпјҢе–®ж—ҘйңҮзӣӘе№…еәҰй«ҳйҒ”1,535й»һгҖӮзөӮе ҙйҮҚжҢ«1,077.28й»һпјҢи·Ңе№…2.31%пјҢж”¶еңЁ45,479.11й»һпјҢеӨұе®Ҳ10ж—Ҙз·ҡиҲҮжңҲз·ҡпјҲзҙ„45,710й»һпјүпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮ‘йЎҚзҲҶеҮә1е…Ҷ1,696.27е„„е…ғеӨ§йҮҸгҖӮ

йҹ“иӮЎзҶ”ж–·иЎқж“Ҡ дәһиӮЎйҖЈйҺ–ж®әзӣӨ

еҚ—йҹ“KOSPIжҢҮж•ёд»Ҡж—Ҙй–Ӣй«ҳеҫҢжҖҘиҪүзӣҙдёӢпјҢзӣӨдёӯйҮҚжҢ«йҒ”8.2%пјҢи§ёзҷјзҶ”ж–·ж©ҹеҲ¶гҖӮе„ҳз®Ўдёүжҳҹйӣ»еӯҗе…¬еёғе„Әж–јеёӮе ҙй җжңҹзҡ„еҲқдј°иІЎе ұпјҢеҚ»еј•зҷјеёӮе ҙгҖҢеҲ©еӨҡеҮәзӣЎгҖҚиіЈеЈ“пјҢеӨ–иіҮе–®ж—ҘеӨ§иҲүиіЈи¶…йҹ“иӮЎйҒ”3.3е…Ҷйҹ“е…ғпјҢжӢ–зҙҜдёүжҳҹйӣ»еӯҗиҲҮSKжө·еҠӣеЈ«иӮЎеғ№йӣҷйӣҷйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫ10%гҖӮжӯӨдёҖеҠҮзғҲжіўеӢ•йҖІдёҖжӯҘж“ҙж•ЈиҮіж—Ҙжң¬иҲҮеҸ°зҒЈеёӮе ҙпјҢеҪўжҲҗеҚҖеҹҹжҖ§иіҮйҮ‘ж’ӨеҮәжҪ®пјҢеҸ°иӮЎжҲҗзӮәеӨ–иіҮиҲҮжң¬еңҹиіҮйҮ‘еҗҢжӯҘиӘҝзҜҖзҡ„йҮҚеҝғд№ӢдёҖгҖӮ

ијқйҒ”жҫ„жё…еҲ©з©әз„Ўж•Ҳ ж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎеӨұе®Ҳ з§‘жҠҖиӮЎйҒӯе…ЁйқўжӢӢе”®

еёӮе ҙеҸҰй—ңжіЁијқйҒ”пјҲNvidiaпјүйҮқе°ҚKyber NVL144ж©ҹж«ғдёӯд»Ӣжқҝе»¶жңҹеӮіиҒһжӯЈејҸеҗҰиӘҚпјҢеј·иӘҝз”ўе“Ғи·Ҝз·ҡең–жңӘеҸ—еҪұйҹҝгҖӮдёҚйҒҺпјҢеңЁй«ҳжӘ”зұҢзўјй¬ҶеӢ•иҲҮиһҚиіҮйӨҳйЎҚеҒҸй«ҳиғҢжҷҜдёӢпјҢзӣёй—ңжҫ„жё…жңӘиғҪжүӯиҪүеёӮе ҙдҝЎеҝғпјҢйӣ»еӯҗгҖҒеҚҠе°Һй«”еҸҠе…үйӣ»ж—ҸзҫӨйҒӯйҒҮе…ЁйқўжҖ§жӢӢе”®пјҢдёӯе°ҸеһӢйӣ»еӯҗиӮЎи·ҢеҒңе®¶ж•ёжҳҺйЎҜеўһеҠ пјҢйЎҜзӨәеёӮе ҙзҹӯз·ҡйўЁйҡӘж„Ҹиӯҳеҝ«йҖҹеҚҮжә«гҖӮ

ж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎд№ҹжҲҗзӮәеЈ“зӣӨдё»еҠӣпјҢзҘһеұұеҸ°з©Қйӣ»(2330)ж—©зӣӨйӣ–еҠӣж’җзӣӨеӢўпјҢзөӮе ҙд»ҚдёӢи·Ң20е…ғпјҢж”¶еңЁ2,440е…ғпјҲ-0.81%пјүпјӣиҒҜзҷјз§‘(2454)еҗҢжӯҘиө°ејұгҖӮиҷ•зҪ®иӮЎиҲҮй«ҳжӘ”еҖӢиӮЎиіЈеЈ“жӣҙзӮәжІүйҮҚпјҢиҒҜйӣ»(2303)йҮҚжҢ«11е…ғиҮі155е…ғпјҢи·Ңе№…йҒ”6.63%пјҢжҲҗзӮәзӣӨйқўз„Ұй»һд№ӢдёҖгҖӮж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎеӨұе®Ҳй—ңйҚөж”Ҝж’җпјҢдҪҝеӨ§зӣӨжҠҖиЎ“йқўиҪүејұгҖӮ

з§‘жҠҖиӮЎйҮҚжҢ« з”ҹжҠҖжҲҗйҒҝйўЁжёҜ

зӣӨйқўиіҮйҮ‘еҮәзҸҫжҳҺйЎҜгҖҢй«ҳдҪҺеҲҮжҸӣгҖҚпјҢз§‘жҠҖиӮЎе…ЁйқўжҪ°ж•—пјҢиіҮйҮ‘иҪүеҗ‘йҳІзҰҰжҖ§ж—ҸзҫӨгҖӮз”ҹжҠҖйҶ«зҷӮйЎһиӮЎжҲҗзӮәзӣӨйқўдә®й»һпјҢеә·йңҲ*(6919)гҖҒйҮ‘з©Һз”ҹжҠҖ(1796)йӣҷйӣҷдә®зҮҲжјІеҒңпјҢй•·иҒ–(6712)гҖҒе…ұдҝЎ-KY(6617)гҖҒжі°е®—(4169)жјІе№…дәҰйҖҫ9%гҖӮ

зӣёе°Қд№ӢдёӢпјҢйӣ»еӯҗж—ҸзҫӨзҒҪжғ…ж…ҳйҮҚгҖӮзҹҪж ј(6257)еҫһй«ҳй»һжҡҙи·Ң11.36%пјҢеӨ§жҜ…(2478)гҖҒж—Ҙйӣ»иІҝ(3090)гҖҒеҫ·еҫ®(3675)гҖҒзҫҺзҗӘз‘Ә(4721)еҗҢжӯҘи·ҢеҒңпјӣе…үйӣ»иҲҮжқҝеҚЎж—ҸзҫӨдәҰе…ЁйқўиҪүејұпјҢжҳ жі°(2399)гҖҒиҒҜдёҖе…ү(3441)йӣҷйӣҷи·ҢеҒңгҖӮеӮіз”ўж—ҸзҫӨеҗҢжЁЈжңӘиғҪеҖ–е…ҚпјҢеҚ—дәһ(1303)и·ҢеҒңпјҢе®Ҹжҷ®(2536)йҮҚжҢ«йҖҫ10%гҖӮйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎеүҮзӣёе°ҚжҠ—и·ҢпјҢеҜҢйӮҰйҮ‘(2881)йҖҶеӢўж”¶зҙ…пјӣйғЁеҲҶйЎҢжқҗиӮЎеҰӮе»әзўҒ(3046)гҖҒз‘һзҘәйӣ»йҖҡ(6416)гҖҒжҚ·ж•Ҹ-KY(6525)еүҮйҖҶеӢўдә®зҮҲжјІеҒңгҖӮ

еҫҢеёӮи§ҖеҜҹиҪүи¶Ёдҝқе®Ҳ

еёӮе ҙдәәеЈ«жҢҮеҮәпјҢеӨ§зӣӨд»Ҡж—ҘдёҖиҲүи·Ңз ҙ10ж—Ҙз·ҡиҲҮжңҲз·ҡж”Ҝж’җпјҢзҹӯжңҹжҠҖиЎ“жҢҮжЁҷе‘ҲзҸҫдҝ®жӯЈи·ЎиұЎгҖӮз”ұж–јеңӢйҡӣж”ҝз¶“еұҖеӢўжіўеӢ•гҖҒжө·еӨ–еёӮе ҙдёҚзўәе®ҡжҖ§еӨ–жәўпјҢй«ҳжӘ”зұҢзўјд»Қжңүеҫ…йҖІдёҖжӯҘжІүжҫұгҖӮеұ•жңӣеҫҢеёӮпјҢж•ҙй«”зӣӨеӢўиө°еӢўд»Қй ҲиҰ–е…ЁзҗғеҚҠе°Һй«”дҫӣжҮүйҸҲзҮҹж”¶иЎЁзҸҫеҸҠеӨ–иіҮиіҮйҮ‘жөҒеҗ‘иҖҢе®ҡгҖӮж“ҚдҪңдёҠе®ңйҒ©еәҰжӘўиҰ–иіҮз”ўй…ҚзҪ®пјҢеҜ©ж…Һи©•дј°еёӮе ҙжіўеӢ•йўЁйҡӘпјҢйқңеҫ…зӣӨеӢўзөҗж§Ӣжӯўз©©гҖӮ

news.Title: Recent Rumblings From the Fed Could Make This Vanguard Bond ETF a Better Buy
news.Content: The Federal Reserve might not be done raising interest rates to fight inflation. According to a June 30 interview with CNBC, Cleveland Federal Reserve President Beth Hammack said that the artificial intelligence (AI) boom could be causing inflation, with high demand for AI infrastructure and energy driving higher costs in the economy. Hammack said: "We've ...
news.AI_Summary:
вҖў Cleveland Federal Reserve President Beth Hammack suggests the AI boom could be contributing to persistent inflation, potentially requiring higher interest rates.
вҖў If inflation remains high, the Fed may need to raise interest rates later in 2026, increasing interest rate risk for bond investors.
вҖў Higher interest rates lead to lower bond prices, with longer-duration bonds being more sensitive to these changes.
вҖў The Vanguard Ultra-Short Bond ETF (VUSB) is presented as a potential option for investors concerned about interest rate risk, offering a portfolio of short-term, high-quality corporate bonds.
вҖў VUSB has an average duration of 1.0 year, an expense ratio of 0.10%, and has delivered average annual returns of 3.49% over the past five years.
news.Keywords: Federal Reserve, interest rates, inflation, bond ETFs, interest rate risk

news.Title: гҖҠзҫҺиӮЎдё»йЎҢйҖұе ұгҖӢжүӢиЎ“ж©ҹеҷЁдәәвҖ”ISRGгҖҒMDTгҖҒSYK
news.Content:
MoneyDJж–°иҒһ 2026-07-07 15:58:32 ж•ёдҪҚе…§е®№дёӯеҝғ зҷјдҪҲ

Intuitive SurgicalпјҲISRG.USпјү

2026е№ҙз¬¬дёҖеӯЈпјҢIntuitive SurgicalзҮҹж”¶27.7е„„зҫҺе…ғгҖҒе№ҙеўһ23%пјҢдёҰжҠҠ2026е№ҙda VinciжүӢиЎ“йҮҸжҲҗй•·жҢҮеј•з”ұ13%-15%дёҠдҝ®иҮі13.5%-15.5%гҖӮеҗҢеӯЈda Vinci 5ж–°еўһиЈқж©ҹ232еҸ°пјҢйЎҜзӨәжҲҗй•·иЁҠиҷҹеҗҢжҷӮдҫҶиҮӘжүӢиЎ“йҮҸиҲҮж–°е№іеҸ°ж»ІйҖҸгҖӮ

MedtronicпјҲMDT.USпјү

7жңҲ7ж—ҘпјҢMedtronicеҲҠзҷ»HUGO RASзҡ„Robotic Clinical SpecialistиҒ·зјәпјҢе·ҘдҪңе…§е®№ж¶өи“ӢйҶ«йҷўе°Һе…ҘгҖҒиЎ“иҖ…иЁ“з·ҙгҖҒжүӢиЎ“е®ӨйғЁзҪІиҲҮpilot siteйҮҢзЁӢзў‘иҝҪи№ӨгҖӮиҒ·еӢҷиҰҒжұӮеҮәе·®жҜ”дҫӢи¶…йҒҺ75%пјҢеҸҚжҳ е•ҶжҘӯеҢ–йҮҚй»һжӯЈиҗҪеңЁиЈқж©ҹеҫҢе•ҹеӢ•иҲҮйҷўе…§иҗҪең°гҖӮ

StrykerпјҲSYK.USпјү

Strykerиҝ‘жңҹжңҖжҳҺзўәзҡ„йӘЁз§‘ж©ҹеҷЁдәәиЁҠиҷҹпјҢжҳҜMakoе…ЁзҗғзҙҜиЁҲжүӢиЎ“йҮҸе·Іи¶…йҒҺ100иҗ¬дҫӢгҖӮеҺҹе§ӢиіҮж–ҷеҗҢжҷӮжҢҮеҮәпјҢMakoе·ІеңЁе…ЁзҗғйҒ”жҲҗж•ёеҚғеҘ—иЈқж©ҹпјҢд»ЈиЎЁз«¶зҲӯз„Ұй»һжӯЈз”ұж–°еўһиЁӯеӮҷпјҢиҪүеҗ‘ж—ўжңүе№іеҸ°зҡ„й«ҳй »дҪҝз”ЁиҲҮиЎ“ејҸж»ІйҖҸгҖӮ

Zimmer BiometпјҲZBH.USпјү

7жңҲ6ж—ҘпјҢZimmer Biometзӣёй—ңиіҮж–ҷйЎҜзӨәпјҢPersona Partial KneeжӯЈиҲҮROSA KneeеҸҠж•ёдҪҚжүӢиЎ“е№іеҸ°й…ҚеҘ—жҺЁйҖІпјҢдёҰзҙҚе…ҘAIиҰҸеҠғе·Ҙе…·гҖӮйҖҷдёҖйҖұзҡ„дё»йЎҢиЁҠиҷҹдёҚжҳҜж–°ж©ҹеҷЁдәәиЈқж©ҹпјҢиҖҢжҳҜд»ҘжӨҚе…Ҙзү©зөҗеҗҲж©ҹеҷЁдәәиҲҮж•ёдҪҚжөҒзЁӢж“ҙе……иҶқй—ңзҜҖз”ўе“Ғз·ҡгҖӮ

news.Title: гҖҠж—ҘиӮЎгҖӢж—Ҙз¶“еҸ—еҚҠе°Һй«”йЎһиӮЎжӢ–зҙҜпјҢж”¶и·Ң2.12%
news.Content:
MoneyDJж–°иҒһ 2026-07-07 15:56:40 ж•ёдҪҚе…§е®№дёӯеҝғ зҷјдҪҲ

ж—ҘиӮЎд»Ҡ(7)ж—Ҙиө°ејұпјҢж—Ҙз¶“225жҢҮж•ёж”¶ж–ј68,256.96й»һпјҢдёӢи·Ң1,480.73й»һжҲ–2.12%пјӣжқұиӯүиӮЎеғ№жҢҮж•ё(TOPIX)ж”¶ж–ј4,062.26й»һпјҢдёӢи·Ң39.70й»һжҲ–0.97%гҖӮзӣӨйқўдё»и»ёд»ҚжҳҜSamsung Electronics(005930.KS)иІЎе ұе…¬еёғеҫҢеј•зҷјзҡ„ж—Ҙйҹ“еҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮAIзӣёй—ңиӮЎиӘҝж•ҙпјҢж—ҘиӮЎйўЁйҡӘеҒҸеҘҪжҳҺйЎҜйҷҚжә«пјҢж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎжүҝеЈ“жҲҗзӮәеӨ§зӣӨеӣһжӘ”зҡ„дё»еӣ гҖӮ

еҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮAIж–№йқўпјҢSamsung Electronicsе…¬еёғ2026е№ҙ4иҮі6жңҲиІЎе ұеҫҢпјҢе„ҳз®Ўж•ёж“ҡиЎЁйқўе„Әж–јй җжңҹпјҢдҪҶжңӘиғҪж»ҝи¶іеёӮе ҙжӣҙй«ҳжңҹеҫ…пјҢеё¶еӢ•ж—Ҙйҹ“еҚҠе°Һй«”иӮЎжҷ®йҒҚеӣһжӘ”гҖӮдҫқеҖӢиӮЎдҫҶзңӢпјҢKioxia Holdings(285A.JP)гҖҒжқұдә¬еЁҒеҠӣз§‘еүө(8035.JP)гҖҒIBIDEN(4062.JP)гҖҒTDK(6762.JP)гҖҒKyocera(6971.JP)гҖҒMurata Manufacturing(6981.JP)гҖҒTaiyo Yuden(6976.JP)иҲҮFujikura(5803.JP)зӯүеқҮиө°ејұпјҢе°Қж—Ҙз¶“225жҢҮж•ёеҪўжҲҗжҳҺйЎҜжӢ–зҙҜгҖӮ

жө·еӨ–жғ…з·’ж–№йқўпјҢйҹ“еңӢиҲҮе…¶д»–дәһжҙІеёӮе ҙиЎЁзҸҫеҒҸејұпјҢеҠ дёҠNasdaq 100жңҹиІЁз–ІејұпјҢйҖІдёҖжӯҘеЈ“жҠ‘ж—ҘиӮЎжғ…з·’гҖӮеёӮе ҙд№ҹжҸҗеҲ°е…Ёзҗғз§‘жҠҖиӮЎиӘҝж•ҙе»¶зәҢпјҢдҪҝеҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮAIдҫӣжҮүйҸҲзҡ„иіЈеЈ“ж“ҙж•ЈпјҢзӣӨдёӯи·Ңе№…дёҖеәҰж“ҙеӨ§гҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢж—Ҙжң¬й•·жңҹеҲ©зҺҮдёҠеҚҮпјҢжҲҗзӮәиӮЎеёӮеҸҰдёҖй …еЈ“еҠӣгҖӮйЎһиӮЎијӘеӢ•дёҠпјҢйҠҖиЎҢиӮЎзӣёе°Қж’җзӣӨпјҢйҠҖиЎҢжҘӯгҖҒиӯүеҲёиҲҮе•Ҷе“ҒжңҹиІЁдәӨжҳ“жҘӯгҖҒжңҚеӢҷжҘӯзӯүйЎһиӮЎиЎЁзҸҫијғдҪіпјҢеё¶еӢ•TOPIXзӣӨдёӯдёҖеәҰиө°еј·гҖӮзӣёијғд№ӢдёӢпјҢйҮ‘еұ¬иЈҪе“ҒгҖҒйқһйҗөйҮ‘еұ¬иҲҮжө·йҒӢжҘӯзӯүйЎһиӮЎдёӢи·ҢпјҢйЎҜзӨәиіҮйҮ‘жҳҺйЎҜиҪүеҗ‘йҳІзҰҰиҲҮе…§йңҖзӣёй—ңж—ҸзҫӨгҖӮ

гҖҠж—ҘиӮЎгҖӢж—Ҙз¶“ж”¶жјІ0.86% йҮҚиҝ”7иҗ¬й»һеӨ§й—ң

гҖҠж—ҘиӮЎгҖӢж—Ҙз¶“еӨ§жјІ4.61% еүөж”¶зӣӨж–°й«ҳ

news.Title: гҖҠеҸ°иӮЎзӣӨеҫҢгҖӢз ҙжңҲз·ҡжҢ«и·Ң1077й»һпјҢдёүеӨ§жі•дәәиіЈи¶…946е„„
news.Content:
MoneyDJж–°иҒһ 2026-07-07 15:49:06 ж–°иҒһдёӯеҝғ зҷјдҪҲ

еҸ°иӮЎд»Ҡ(7)ж—ҘзӣӨеҲқеҸ—иІ»еҚҠжҢҮж•ёдёҠж—ҘдёҠжјІйҖҫ2%жҝҖеӢөпјҢз”ұеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖҒиҒҜзҷјз§‘гҖҒж—ҘжңҲе…үй ҳи»Қж”»е …пјҢеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёдёҖеәҰдёҠжјІи¶…йҒҺ400й»һпјҢжғҹзӣӨдёӯеӮіеҮәеӨ§ж‘©дј°AIжҠ•иіҮе‘Ёжңҹе°Үзҷјз”ҹиҪүи®ҠгҖҒеё¶еӢ•зҫҺиӮЎйӣ»еӯҗзӣӨеҸҠж—Ҙйҹ“иӮЎеёӮиө°ејұпјҢеҠ дёҠзӣӨдёӯеҸ°е…үйӣ»гҖҒеңӢе·ЁжҖҘж®әпјҢеҗҢжҷӮеҸ°е№ЈиІ¶еӢўд№ҹж“ҙеӨ§пјҢдё”19еӨ§йЎһиӮЎеҫһжјІеӨҡи·Ңе°‘гҖҒиҪүзӮәеғ…йҮ‘иһҚ/еҢ–еӯёз”ҹжҠҖиӮЎж’җзӣӨдёӢпјҢеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёеҚҲзӣӨеҫҢдёҖи·Ҝиө°дҪҺпјҢзөӮе ҙж”¶еңЁ45479.11й»һпјҢеӨ§и·Ң1077.28й»һжҲ–2.31%пјҢдёҖиҲүж‘ңз ҙ10ж—Ҙз·ҡеҸҠжңҲз·ҡпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸз•ҘеўһиҮі1е…Ҷ1696.27е„„е…ғгҖҒж—ҘKйҖЈе…©й»‘гҖӮ

еҚҡйҖҡзӯүAIжҷ¶зүҮиӮЎд»ҘеҸҠжҲҙзҲҫиЎқй«ҳпјҢеё¶еӢ•з§‘жҠҖиӮЎеҸҚеҪҲпјҢзҫҺеңӢеӣӣеӨ§жҢҮж•ё6ж—Ҙе…Ёйқўж”¶й«ҳгҖӮдәһжҙІиӮЎеёӮж–№йқўпјҢеӣ зҫҺиӮЎйӣ»еӯҗзӣӨиө°ејұгҖҒе°ҺиҮҙдәһзі»еҚҠе°Һй«”иӮЎжңӘеҸҚжҳ иІ»еҚҠиө°еј·еҸҚе‘ҲйҮҚжҢ«пјҢжӢ–зҙҜж—Ҙз¶“225жҢҮж•ёж”¶и·Ң2.12%пјӣйҹ“еңӢKOSPIжҢҮж•ёж”¶и·Ң4.91%гҖӮ

еҸ°иӮЎд»Ҡж—ҘиіЈеЈ“жҳҺйЎҜеҚҮжә«пјҢдёҠдёӢйңҮзӣӘйҖҫ1500й»һпјҢйӣ»еӯҗиӮЎжҷ®йҒҚејұеӢўпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»йӣ–дёҖеәҰйҮҚиҝ”2500е…ғй—ңеҚЎпјҢзөӮе ҙд»ҘжңҖдҪҺеғ№2440е…ғдҪңж”¶пјҢдёӢи·Ң0.81%пјҢиҮҙиҢӮж®әиҮіи·ҢеҒңпјҢйҙ»еӢҒгҖҒж¬ЈиҲҲгҖҒеҘҮйӢҗгҖҒжҷәйӮҰгҖҒиҒҜйӣ»йҖЈиўӮиө°и·ҢпјҢжғҹе·қж№–6жңҲзҮҹж”¶е ұе–ңпјҢжҺЁеҚҮиӮЎеғ№йҖҶеӢўеӢҒжҸҡйҖҫ6%гҖӮиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж—ҸзҫӨж·ӘзӮәйҮҚзҒҪеҚҖпјҢж—Ҙйӣ»иІҝгҖҒеӨ§жҜ…гҖҒдҝЎжҳҢйӣ»гҖҒзҰҫдјёе ӮгҖҒеңӢе·Ё*гҖҒиҲҲеӢӨгҖҒиҸҜж–°з§‘гҖҒе…үй ЎгҖҒйҮ‘еұұйӣ»зҡҶж”¶еңЁи·ҢеҒңжқҝеғ№дҪҚгҖӮ

еңЁ29еӨ§йЎһиӮЎиЎЁзҸҫдёҠпјҢиЎЁзҸҫијғдҪізҡ„еүҚе…©еӨ§йЎһиӮЎеҲҶеҲҘзӮәз”ҹжҠҖйҶ«зҷӮжјІ3.41%пјҢйҮ‘иһҚдҝқйҡӘжјІ1.15%пјҢйЎҜзӨәиіҮйҮ‘иҪүеҗ‘йҳІзҰҰжҖ§йЎҢжқҗж—ҸзҫӨпјҢжҲҗзӮәзӣӨйқўе°‘ж•ёдә®й»һгҖӮеЎ‘иҶ йЎһиӮЎеүҮи·ҢеӢўжңҖйҮҚпјҢдёӢи·Ң8.15%пјҢе…үйӣ»гҖҒйӣ»еӯҗйӣ¶зө„д»¶гҖҒеҢ–е·ҘиҲҮзҺ»з’ғйҷ¶з“·зӯүйЎһиӮЎеҗҢжӯҘиө°дҪҺгҖӮ

дёүеӨ§жі•дәәеӢ•еҗ‘ж–№йқўпјҢд»Ҡж—ҘдёүеӨ§жі•дәәзёҪиЁҲиіЈи¶…946.91е„„е…ғпјӣе…¶дёӯпјҢеӨ–иіҮйҷёиіҮ(дёҚеҗ«еӨ–иіҮиҮӘзҮҹе•Ҷ)иіЈи¶…547.31е„„е…ғпјҢжҠ•дҝЎиІ·и¶…87.73е„„е…ғпјҢиҮӘзҮҹе•ҶиіЈи¶…487.33е„„е…ғгҖӮ

еңӢе·ЁеҶҚжјІз”ўе“Ғеғ№ж јпјҢеҠ©жҺЁеҚҮзҮҹж”¶еҸҠзҚІеҲ©

иў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж—әгҖҒж—Ҙе» йӣ»еӯҗйӣ¶д»¶еҮәиІЁйЎҚйҖЈ8жҸҡ йӣ»е®№еҸІй«ҳ

иіҮж–ҷдҫҶжәҗ- MoneyDJзҗҶиІЎз¶І

news.Title: еҸ°иӮЎе»¶й•·дәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“пјҹеҗіжқұдә®пјҡйЎ§еҸҠеӮіз”ўжҮүжңүй…ҚеҘ—
news.Content:
пјҲдёӯеӨ®зӨҫиЁҳиҖ…жӣҫзӯ еәӯеҸ°еҢ—2026е№ҙ7жңҲ7ж—Ҙйӣ»пјүиӯүдәӨжүҖз ”иӯ°е»¶й•·еҸ°иӮЎдәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“пјҢе·Ҙе•ҶеҚ”йҖІжңғзҗҶдәӢй•·еҗіжқұдә®д»ҠеӨ©иЎЁзӨәпјҢеҸ°иӮЎдәӨжҳ“йҮҸиҝ‘е№ҙжҢҒзәҢжҲҗй•·пјҢеёӮеҖјдҪҚеұ…е…ЁзҗғеүҚеҲ—пјҢиӢҘй…ҚеҗҲеңӢйҡӣдәӨжҳ“жүҖжҷӮй–“е»¶й•·дәӨжҳ“пјҢиҲҮдё–з•ҢжҺҘи»ҢдёҰйқһеЈһдәӢпјӣдёҚйҒҺпјҢз”ұж–јеҸ°зҒЈз¶“жҝҹе‘ҲзҸҫKеһӢзҷјеұ•пјҢе»¶й•·дәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“е°ҚеӮізөұз”ўжҘӯеҸҜиғҪеё¶дҫҶиЎқж“ҠпјҢж”ҝеәңжҮүз ”иӯ°зӣёй—ңй…ҚеҘ—жҺӘж–ҪгҖӮ

иӯүдәӨжүҖжӯЈз ”иӯ°е»¶й•·еҸ°иӮЎдәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“пјҢеҲқжӯҘж–№еҗ‘еҢ…жӢ¬е»¶й•·1е°ҸжҷӮиҮі1.5е°ҸжҷӮпјҢжңүеҸҜиғҪж”¶зӣӨжҷӮй–“е»¶иҮідёӢеҚҲ3жҷӮ30еҲҶгҖӮе·Ҙе•ҶеҚ”йҖІжңғд»ҠеӨ©иҲүиЎҢе…¬дә®и¬ӣеә§пјҢзҗҶдәӢй•·еҗіжқұдә®жңғеүҚеҸ—иЁӘжҷӮиЎЁзӨәпјҢеҸ°иӮЎеёӮе ҙиҝ‘е№ҙдәӨжҳ“йҮҸжҢҒзәҢеўһеҠ пјҢиӢҘе»¶й•·дәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“пјҢжңүеҠ©еҸ°зҒЈеёӮе ҙиҲҮе…ЁзҗғжҺҘи»ҢгҖӮ

дёҚйҒҺпјҢеҗіжқұдә®жҢҮеҮәпјҢеҸ°зҒЈз¶“жҝҹзӣ®еүҚд»ҚеӯҳеңЁKеһӢзҷјеұ•зҸҫиұЎпјҢиӮЎеёӮиЎЁзҸҫдё»иҰҒйӣҶдёӯж–јеҚҠе°Һй«”гҖҒиіҮиЁҠиҲҮйҖҡиЁҠз§‘жҠҖпјҲICTпјүгҖҒдәәе·Ҙжҷәж…§пјҲAIпјүзӯүз”ўжҘӯпјҢиЁұеӨҡеӮізөұз”ўжҘӯйӣ–д№ҹжңүе„ӘиіӘдјҒжҘӯпјҢдҪҶиӢҘе»¶й•·дәӨжҳ“жҷӮй–“пјҢеҸҜиғҪеҸ—еҲ°дёҖе®ҡиЎқж“ҠпјҢж”ҝеәңжҮүжҖқиҖғзӣёй—ңй…ҚеҘ—жҺӘж–ҪгҖӮ

еҗіжқұдә®е»әиӯ°пјҢеҸҜеҫһеўһеҠ еёӮе ҙиіҮйҮ‘дҫҶжәҗи‘—жүӢпјҢдҫӢеҰӮиӘҝж•ҙдҝқйҡӘжҘӯиіҮжң¬йҒ©и¶ізҺҮпјҲRBCпјүзӣёй—ңиҰҸзҜ„пјҢи®“дҝқйҡӘиіҮйҮ‘иғҪжңүжӣҙеӨҡжҠ•е…ҘеёӮе ҙзҡ„з©әй–“гҖӮ

йҮқе°ҚиЎҢж”ҝйҷўж—ҘеүҚйҖҡйҒҺи»Қе…¬ж•ҷиӘҝи–ӘпјҢеҗіжқұдә®еүҮиЎЁзӨәпјҢеҠ и–ӘжҳҜеҗҲзҗҶдё”жӯЈйқўзҡ„дәӢжғ…пјҢи»Қе…¬ж•ҷдәәе“ЎиҫӣиӢҰе·ҘдҪңпјҢиӘҝи–ӘеҖјеҫ—иӮҜе®ҡпјӣд»–д№ҹжҢҮеҮәпјҢйҮ‘иһҚжҘӯеӨҡе№ҙдҫҶжң¬дҫҶе°ұжңүжҜҸе№ҙиӘҝи–ӘеҲ¶еәҰпјҢдјҒжҘӯиӢҘжңүзҚІеҲ©пјҢжҮүи©ІзөҰе“Ўе·ҘжӣҙеӨҡи–ӘиіҮиҲҮзҚҺеӢөгҖӮ

Hybio Pharmaceutical

Sandoz

news.Title: Meet the Dividend King Stock That's Up 20% in 2026. Here's Why It Can Continue Outperforming the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 in the Second Half.
news.Content:
As of market close on July 3, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) and the Nasdaq-100 are up 9.3% and 16.2%, respectively, year to date (YTD). This is well ahead of their historical average annual gains. The tech sector, especially semiconductor stocks , has been the driver of broader market returns. But that doesn't mean all value stocks are underperforming the major indexes.

Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE: CL) is up 20.4% YTD. And it's also an ultra-reliable dividend stock that has paid uninterrupted dividends since 1895 and has increased its payout for 63 consecutive years. That streak earns Colgate-Palmolive a spot on the list of Dividend Kings, which are companies that have paid and increased their dividends for at least 50 consecutive years.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

Here's why Colgate-Palmolive remains a top buy now even after its recent run-up.

Colgate-Palmolive is at the top of its game

Colgate-Palmolive has been a standout in the household and personal products industry. The company is guiding for 2026 net sales growth of 2% to 6% and organic sales growth of 1% to 4% at a time when many of its peers are experiencing sales declines. And even with margins under pressure, Colgate-Palmolive remains one of the most profitable companies in its industry. By comparison, Unilever , Kenvue , Church & Dwight , Clorox , Kimberly-Clark, and Estee Lauder all have operating margins under 20%.

The industry has been dealing with inflationary pressures and consumer resistance to price increases. But Colgate-Palmolive has done a masterful job of navigating these challenges through its elite brand portfolio, highly efficient supply chain and operations, and geographic diversification.

In addition to its flagship Colgate and Palmolive brands, the company owns Softsoap, Irish Spring, Tom's of Maine, and Speed Stick, among others. One of Colgate-Palmolive's top brands, Hill's Pet Nutrition, made up 23% of total 2025 sales.

Without factoring in Hill's, Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA), Latin America, and Asia Pacific sales are more than triple those of North America, which has helped make Colgate-Palmolive resistant to U.S.-specific inflationary pressures. In the first quarter of 2026, North America was the only region that reported declining net and organic sales, while Latin America and EMEA posted double-digit growth and total company net sales rose 8.4% year over year.

Story Continues

A dividend you can count on

Colgate-Palmolive is far from cheap -- trading at 25 times forward earnings -- because the stock price has been rising faster than the company's earnings growth. But Colgate-Palmolive deserves its premium valuation because its results are solid despite a difficult operating environment. This resilience is particularly appealing to risk-averse folks seeking a stable passive income stream to help supplement retirement income. If inflationary pressures ease and consumer spending improves, a rising tide will lift the broader household and personal products industry. But Colgate-Palmolive isn't dependent on those factors to drive sales growth.

Colgate-Palmolive yields 2.2%, which is good but not quite high-yield territory. Many of its peers offer higher yields because they distribute the vast majority of their cash flow to shareholders through dividends, whereas Colgate-Palmolive's dividend is highly affordable. Its trailing-12-month free cash flow per share is at an all-time high of $4.66, well over double its $2.06 per-share annualized dividend.

So while Colgate-Palmolive could easily afford to pay a higher dividend, the company prefers a balanced approach of using cash to reinvest in the business, paying a steadily growing (and manageable) dividend, and buying back stock. Colgate-Palmolive has reduced its share count by 10% over the last decade, which has helped make the stock a better value.

Investing in a market leader

Colgate-Palmolive's geographic diversification and portfolio of leading brands across pet nutrition and oral, personal, and home care make it highly recession resistant. The company continues to deliver solid growth through volume and price increases, while many of its peers face a difficult trade-off: either cutting prices to drive volume or keeping prices high at the expense of lower sales volumes.

All told, Colgate-Palmolive stands out as one of the most reliable dividend-paying stocks on the market. It's a top buy for the second half of the year for investors who don't mind paying a premium price for a quality company.

вҖў дёүжҳҹиӮЎеғ№йҮҚжҢ«10%еј•зҷјеёӮе ҙж“”жҶӮпјҢеҸҜиғҪе°Қе…Ёзҗғз§‘жҠҖиӮЎеё¶дҫҶиӯҰзӨәгҖӮ

вҖў дёүжҳҹеҲқжӯҘжҘӯзёҫжңӘжҸҗдҫӣи©ізҙ°ж•ёж“ҡпјҢеёӮе ҙе°ҚAIдјҒжҘӯзҡ„жҢҮж•ёејҸж“ҙејөж”ҫз·©ж„ҹеҲ°ж“”жҶӮгҖӮ
вҖў е„ҳз®ЎеүҚзһ»зӣҲеҲ©жҲҗй•·еј·еӢҒпјҢдҪҶе·Ій–Ӣе§Ӣж”ҫз·©пјҢеёӮе ҙе°Қз§‘жҠҖиӮЎдј°еҖјеЈ“еҠӣеҚҮй«ҳгҖӮ

news.Title: еӮіеҘҮжҠ•иіҮеӨ§её«е–ҠгҖҢжҲ‘жӯЈеңЁиіЈгҖҚ иӯҰе‘ҠAIжіЎжІ«пјҡеҲҘзӣёдҝЎиҸҜзҲҫиЎ—
news.Content:
з®ЎзҗҶиіҮз”ўиҰҸжЁЎжӣҫй«ҳйҒ” 1650 е„„зҫҺе…ғгҖҒжҲҗеҠҹй җжё¬ 2000 е№ҙз¶Іи·ҜжіЎжІ«иҲҮ 2008 е№ҙйҮ‘иһҚеҚұж©ҹзҡ„ 87 жӯІе„„иҗ¬еҜҢзҝҒ Jeremy GranthamпјҢиҝ‘ж—ҘеҶҚеәҰе°ҚеёӮе ҙжҠ•дёӢйңҮж’јеҪҲгҖӮд»–е…¬й–ӢиЎЁзӨәпјҢиҮӘе·ұжӯЈжҢҒзәҢиіЈеҮәзҫҺеңӢиӮЎзҘЁпјҢдёҰиӯҰе‘Ҡз•¶еүҚзҫҺиӮЎжӯЈиҷ•ж–јжӯ·еҸІзҙҡжіЎжІ«д№ӢдёӯпјҢиҖҢдәәе·Ҙжҷәж…§пјҲAIпјүзҶұжҪ®жӯЈжҳҜйҖҷе ҙжіЎжІ«зҡ„ж ёеҝғгҖӮ

Grantham иӘҚзӮәпјҢAI жіЎжІ«еҸҜиғҪеңЁжңӘдҫҶе№ҫеӨ©гҖҒе№ҫеҖӢжңҲпјҢз”ҡиҮіе№ҫе№ҙе…§з ҙиЈӮпјҢдёҖж—ҰеёӮе ҙеҸҚиҪүпјҢзҫҺиӮЎжҒҗйҮҚжј” 2000 е№ҙз§‘жҠҖиӮЎеҙ©зӣӨжҷӮзҡ„еҠҮзғҲдҝ®жӯЈгҖӮ

д»–жҢҮеҮәпјҢзӣ®еүҚзҫҺеңӢиӮЎеёӮдј°еҖјз”ҡиҮіжҜ” 2000 е№ҙз¶Іи·ҜжіЎжІ«жҷӮжӣҙй«ҳпјҢиҖҢеёӮе ҙе°Қ AI зҡ„жЁӮи§Җй җжңҹпјҢжӯЈжҺЁеӢ•иіҮз”ўеғ№ж јжҢҒзәҢи„«йӣўеҹәжң¬йқўгҖӮд»–й җдј°пјҢдёҖж—ҰжіЎжІ«з ҙиЈӮпјҢйғЁеҲҶиӮЎзҘЁи·Ңе№…еҸҜиғҪй«ҳйҒ”дёғжҲҗпјҢжғ…жіҒиҲҮз•¶е№ҙйӮЈж–ҜйҒ”е…ӢйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫе…«жҲҗзҡ„жӯ·еҸІеҰӮеҮәдёҖиҪҚгҖӮ

д»–еӣһжҶ¶пјҢ1999 е№ҙжӣҫе…¬й–ӢиӯҰе‘ҠеёӮе ҙдј°еҖјйҒҺй«ҳпјҢз•¶жҷӮеӨҡж•ёеёӮе ҙдәәеЈ«йғҪзҗҶи§Јй«ҳдј°еҖјзөӮе°ҮеӣһжӯёжӯЈеёёж°ҙжә–пјҢдҪҶзңҹжӯЈйЎҳж„ҸжҸҗеүҚж’ӨеҮәзҡ„жҠ•иіҮдәәеҚ»е°‘д№ӢеҸҲе°‘гҖӮдәӢеҫҢиӯүжҳҺпјҢз§‘жҠҖжіЎжІ«з ҙиЈӮи®“зҫҺиӮЎжӯ·з¶“й•·жҷӮй–“дҝ®еҫ©пјҢж—Ҙжң¬иӮЎеёӮжӣҙиҠұдәҶж•ёеҚҒе№ҙжүҚеӣһеҲ°й«ҳй»һгҖӮд»–иӘҚзӮәпјҢеҰӮд»ҠеёӮе ҙеҶҚеәҰйҷ·е…ҘйЎһдјјжғ…еўғпјҢеҸӘжҳҜдё»и§’еҫһз¶Ійҡӣз¶Іи·ҜжҸӣжҲҗ AIгҖӮ

иҸҜзҲҫиЎ—дёҚжңғе‘ҠиЁҙдҪ зҡ„дәӢ

зӣёијғж–јеёӮе ҙжҷ®йҒҚд»ҚжҠјжіЁзҫҺиӮЎзәҢеј·пјҢGrantham зөҰеҮәзҡ„жҠ•иіҮзӯ–з•Ҙзӣёз•¶дҝқе®ҲгҖӮд»–дё»ејөйҷҚдҪҺзҫҺеңӢиӮЎзҘЁй…ҚзҪ®пјҢе°ҮиіҮз”ўиҪүеҗ‘жө·еӨ–еёӮе ҙпјҢеҗҢжҷӮжҸҗй«ҳй»ғйҮ‘гҖҒзҷҪйҠҖгҖҒеӮөеҲёиҲҮзҸҫйҮ‘йғЁдҪҚпјҢд»Ҙеӣ жҮүеҸҜиғҪеҮәзҸҫзҡ„еӨ§е№…дҝ®жӯЈгҖӮ

д»–иӘҚзӮәпјҢеӨҡж•ёжҠ•иіҮйЎ§е•Ҹй®®е°‘жңғеӢёжҠ•иіҮдәәжҸҗеүҚйӣўе ҙпјҢеӣ зӮәеңЁеёӮе ҙд»ҚжҢҒзәҢдёҠжјІжҷӮпјҢзңӢз©әеҫҖеҫҖйңҖиҰҒд»ҳеҮәе·ЁеӨ§д»Јеғ№пјҢд№ҹеҸҜиғҪеӣ жӯӨеӨұеҺ»е·ҘдҪңгҖӮеӣ жӯӨпјҢзңҹжӯЈжҸҗйҶ’еёӮе ҙйўЁйҡӘзҡ„дәәпјҢеҫҖеҫҖдёҚжңғжҲҗзӮәдё»жөҒиҒІйҹігҖӮд»–еј·иӘҝпјҢзңҹжӯЈеӣ°йӣЈзҡ„дёҚжҳҜеҲӨж–·жіЎжІ«жҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁпјҢиҖҢжҳҜйЎҳдёҚйЎҳж„ҸеңЁеёӮе ҙжғ…з·’д»Қз„¶й«ҳжҳӮжҷӮжҸҗеүҚйҷҚдҪҺйўЁйҡӘгҖӮ

жҜ”йҮ‘иһҚеҚұж©ҹжӣҙеӨ§зҡ„йҡұжҶӮпјҡз”ҹиӮІзҺҮдёӢж»‘

йҷӨдәҶйҮ‘иһҚеёӮе ҙпјҢGrantham жӣҙе°Үз„Ұй»һж”ҫеңЁдәәйЎһзӨҫжңғй•·жңҹзҷјеұ•гҖӮд»–иЎЁзӨәпјҢиҮӘе·ұеӨҡе№ҙз ”з©¶ж°ЈеҖҷи®ҠйҒ·еҫҢпјҢиҝ‘е№ҙжӣҙж“”еҝғе…Ёзҗғз”ҹиӮІзҺҮжҢҒзәҢдёӢйҷҚпјҢиӘҚзӮәйҖҷе°ҮжҲҗзӮәжңӘдҫҶж•ёеҚҒе№ҙжңҖеҡҙйҮҚзҡ„зӨҫжңғеҚұж©ҹд№ӢдёҖгҖӮ

д»–еј•з”Ёз ”з©¶жҢҮеҮәпјҢе…Ёзҗғз”·жҖ§зІҫеӯҗжҝғеәҰеңЁйҒҺеҺ»еҚҠдё–зҙҖеӨ§е№…дёӢйҷҚпјҢиӢҘзӣ®еүҚи¶ЁеӢўжҢҒзәҢпјҢжңӘдҫҶдәҢгҖҒдёүеҚҒе№ҙпјҢиҮӘз„¶еҸ—еӯ•жҒҗе°Үж„ҲдҫҶж„Ҳеӣ°йӣЈгҖӮд»–е°ҮеҺҹеӣ жӯёе’Һж–јз”ҹжҙ»дёӯеӨ§йҮҸеӯҳеңЁзҡ„з’°еўғеҢ–еӯёзү©иіӘпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬еЎ‘еҢ–еҠ‘гҖҒйӣҷй…ҡ AпјҲBPAпјүгҖҒдёҚжІҫйҚӢдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҢ–еӯёзү©иіӘд»ҘеҸҠеҫ®еЎ‘иҶ зӯүе…§еҲҶжіҢе№Іж“ҫзү©пјҢиӘҚзӮәйҖҷдәӣжұЎжҹ“зү©жӯЈйҖҗжӯҘеҪұйҹҝдәәйЎһз”ҹж®–иғҪеҠӣгҖӮ

Grantham жҢҮеҮәпјҢзӣёијғж–јйғЁеҲҶжӯҗжҙІеңӢе®¶е·ІеӨ§е№…йҷҗеҲ¶зӣёй—ңеҢ–еӯёзү©иіӘпјҢзҫҺеңӢеңЁжі•иҰҸз®ЎзҗҶдёҠд»Қзӣёе°ҚеҜ¬й¬ҶпјҢд№ҹеӣ жӯӨи®“ж°‘зңҫй•·жңҹжҡҙйңІж–јжӣҙеӨҡжҪӣеңЁйўЁйҡӘд№ӢдёӯгҖӮ

Grantham д№ҹжҸҙеј•йҶ«еӯёз ”з©¶иЎЁзӨәпјҢе“ҲдҪӣеӨ§еӯёиҲҮйҶ«зҷӮж©ҹж§ӢжӣҫиҝҪи№Өжә–еӮҷз”ҹиӮІзҡ„з”·жҖ§пјҢзөҗжһңзҷјзҸҫпјҢж”қеҸ–ијғеӨҡжңүж©ҹи”¬жһңиҖ…пјҢе…¶зІҫеӯҗж•ёйҮҸжҳҺйЎҜе„Әж–јйЈІйЈҹе“ҒиіӘијғе·®зҡ„ж—ҸзҫӨпјӣеҸҰдёҖй …еҘіжҖ§з ”з©¶д№ҹйЎҜзӨәпјҢйЈІйЈҹе“ҒиіӘијғдҪіиҖ…зҡ„жҙ»з”ўзҺҮйЎҜи‘—й«ҳж–јйЈІйЈҹе“ҒиіӘијғе·®иҖ…гҖӮ

д»–иӘҚзӮәпјҢиғҺе…’е°Қз’°еўғжҜ’зҙ зҡ„ж•Ҹж„ҹзЁӢеәҰйҒ й«ҳж–јжҲҗе№ҙдәәпјҢеӣ жӯӨеӯ•жңҹз”ҹжҙ»зҝ’ж…Је°ҚдёӢдёҖд»ЈеҒҘеә·е…·жңүж·ұйҒ еҪұйҹҝгҖӮд»–е»әиӯ°пјҢеӯ•е©ҰжҮүзӣЎеҸҜиғҪжёӣе°‘жҺҘи§ёдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„еҢ–еӯёзү©иіӘпјҢдёҰж”№е–„йЈІйЈҹе…§е®№пјҢд»ҘйҷҚдҪҺз’°еўғжҜ’зҙ её¶дҫҶзҡ„жҪӣеңЁйўЁйҡӘгҖӮ

иіӘз–‘ SpaceX дј°еҖјйҒҺй«ҳ

е°Қж–јиҝ‘е№ҙеёӮе ҙжңҖеҸ—зҹҡзӣ®зҡ„дјҒжҘӯд№ӢдёҖ SpaceX( SPCX-US ) пјҢGrantham еҗҢжЁЈжҠұжҢҒдҝқз•ҷж…ӢеәҰгҖӮйӣ–

news.Title: иҠұж——е–ҠеҚҮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»! жңҖжЁӮи§Җж”»дёҠ"4еӯ—й ӯ"еӨ–иіҮжңҖй«ҳ
news.Content:
[ йқһеҮЎж–°иҒһ ]иЁҳиҖ…е‘ЁжҒ¬еҗҸ,ж”қеҪұи¬қйҡҶиЁј

еҸ°з©Қйӣ»дёӢе‘Ёжі•иӘӘеүҚеӨ•пјҢеӨ–иіҮеңҲе·Із¶“е…ҲиЎҢеҮәе…·зңӢжі•пјҢиҠұж——жңҖж–°е°Үзӣ®жЁҷеғ№иӘҝеҚҮиҮі3800е…ғпјҢз”ҡиҮій җдј°жЁӮи§Җжғ…еўғдёӢпјҢе°ҮжҢ‘жҲ°4000е…ғпјҢеё¶еӢ•еёӮе ҙйҮҚж–°жғіеғҸAIиЎҢжғ…з©әй–“гҖӮеҚідҫҝжҳҜж¬Ўй«ҳзҡ„йҰҷжёҜз ”з©¶ж©ҹж§ӢпјҢд№ҹжңү3500е…ғпјҢе…¶е®ғеғҸжҳҜйҮҺжқ‘гҖҒз‘һйҠҖиҲҮйәҘж јйҮҢзӯүпјҢзӣ®жЁҷеғ№д№ҹе…ЁйғҪеңЁ3400е…ғдёҠдёӢпјҢйҡЁи‘—йңҖжұӮеҫһGPUж“ҙж•ЈеҲ°ASICгҖҒCPUиҲҮз¶ІйҖҡжҷ¶зүҮпјҢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»16ж—Ҙжі•иӘӘжңғиғҪеҗҰйҮӢеҮәжӣҙеј·иІЎжё¬пјҢиҲҮиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәеҶҚиӘҝеҚҮзҡ„иЁҠиҷҹпјҢйғҪжҢҒзәҢжҲҗзӮәжҠ•иіҮдәәй—ңжіЁз„Ұй»һпјҒ

еҸ°з©Қйӣ»жі•иӘӘжңғйҖІе…ҘеҖ’ж•ёиЁҲжҷӮпјҒеӨ–иіҮзӣ®жЁҷеғ№еҶҚжҺҖдёҠдҝ®жҪ®пјҢиҠұж——дёҖеҸЈж°Је–ҠеҲ°3800е…ғпјҢжңҖжЁӮи§Җжғ…еўғжӣҙзӣҙжҢҮ4000е…ғпјҢеҲ·ж–°еӨ–иіҮеңҲжңҖй«ҳзҙҖйҢ„пјҒзңӢеҘҪAIйңҖжұӮжҢҒзәҢзҲҶзҷјпјҢиҠұж——й җдј°жі•иӘӘжңғе°ҮдёҠдҝ®е…Ёе№ҙзҮҹж”¶жҲҗй•·зӣ®жЁҷпјҢд»ҘеҸҠгҖҢй•·жңҹзҮҹж”¶гҖҚе№ҙиӨҮеҗҲжҲҗй•·зҺҮзҡ„еұ•жңӣпјҢдёҰеҗҢжӯҘиӘҝй«ҳгҖҢиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәй җдј°гҖҚгҖӮ

е…ғеҜҢжҠ•йЎ§и‘ЈдәӢй•· жұҹжө©иҫІпјҡгҖҢпјҲиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәпјүиҠұж——йҖҷйӮҠпјҢйғҪе·Із¶“иӘҝеҲ°еӨ§жҰӮ750е„„еҲ°800е„„зҫҺе…ғпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҲ‘жғізӣёй—ңзҡ„еҫҢзәҢеұ•жңӣйғҪйқһеёёжЁӮи§ҖгҖӮд»–еҖ‘иӘҚзӮәзҸҫеңЁAIзӣёй—ңзҡ„иЎҢжғ…пјҢдёҚеҸӘжҳҜеңЁGPUпјҢз”ҡиҮіе·Із¶“еӨ–жәўеҲ°ASICгҖҒжҲ–иҖ…еғҸCPUпјҢз”ҡиҮіжҺҘдёӢдҫҶеғҸжҳҜз¶ІйҖҡжҷ¶зүҮйҖҷдәӣзӯүзӯүпјҢдёҖгҖҒе…©еҖӢжңҲд№ӢеүҚпјҢеӨ§жҰӮе·Із¶“жңүеӮіеҮәдҫҶеҸ°з©Қйӣ»иҰҒй–Ӣе§ӢжјІеғ№гҖӮеҒҮеҰӮжҳҜиӘӘжҺҘдёӢдҫҶд»–йҖҷйӮҠзӣёй—ңеҲ©жҪӨйғҪеҸҜд»ҘдҝқжҢҒдҪҸзҡ„и©ұпјҢзўәеҜҰжҲ‘жғіе°ҚиӮЎеғ№дҫҶи¬ӣжңғжңүеҫҲеӨ§зҡ„еҠ©зӣҠгҖӮгҖҚ

йҷӨдәҶиҠұж——д№ӢеӨ–пјҢAletheiaиіҮжң¬е–Ҡ3500е…ғпјҢйҮҺжқ‘гҖҒз‘һйҠҖгҖҒйәҘж јзҗҶгҖҒйҮҢжҳӮзӣ®жЁҷеғ№д№ҹйғҪз«ҷдёҠ3300~3400е…ғпјҢй«ҳзӣӣиҲҮз‘һз©—еүҮеҗҢжӯҘдёҠзңӢ3000е…ғеӨ§й—ңгҖӮ

жі•дәәзңӢеҘҪAIйңҖжұӮж“ҙеӨ§пјҢеҫһGPUе»¶дјёеҲ°ASIC гҖҒCPUд»ҘеҸҠй«ҳйҖҹз¶Іи·Ҝжҷ¶зүҮзӯүжҮүз”ЁпјҢеё¶еӢ•2еҘҲзұігҖҒ3еҘҲзұійңҖжұӮе…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢз¶ӯжҢҒж»ҝијүгҖӮ

еә·е’ҢиӯүеҲёжҠ•йЎ§жҠ•иіҮз ”з©¶йғЁдё»з®Ў е‘Ӯжҷүз¶ӯпјҡгҖҢе…¶еҜҰдёӢеҚҠе№ҙиғҪиҰӢеәҰеҫҲй«ҳпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬еҸ°з©Қйӣ»е…¬еҸёжң¬иә«пјҢд№ҹжҢҒзәҢеңЁз¬¬дәҢеӯЈдёҠдҝ®дёӯй•·жңҹеұ•жңӣзҮҹпјҢж”¶жҲҗй•·зҺҮд»ҘзҫҺе…ғиЁҲеғ№зҡ„йғЁеҲҶеҸҜиғҪжңү30%д»ҘдёҠзҡ„жҲҗй•·пјҢе»¶зәҢеҲ°2028е№ҙпјҢ2еҘҲзұійңҖжұӮйҖҷйӮҠпјҢзңӢиө·дҫҶзӣ®еүҚйғҪжҳҜйқһеёёзҡ„жЁӮи§ҖпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҲ‘еҖ‘зңӢеҲ°еӨ–иіҮеҲёе•ҶйҖҷйӮҠпјҢзҙӣзҙӣиӘҝй«ҳеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҹӯдёӯй•·жңҹзӣ®жЁҷеғ№пјҢзҮҹж”¶зҚІеҲ©зҡ„й җжңҹпјҢз”ҡиҮіжҜӣеҲ©зҺҮйғЁеҲҶпјҢе…¶еҜҰйғҪжҳҜеҒҸжЁӮи§Җзҷјеұ•гҖӮгҖҚ

news.Title: AMD Is 11% Away From Joining the $1 Trillion Club. Could It Get There This Year?
news.Content:
AMD (NASDAQ: AMD) carries a market value of about $920 billion. To join the $1 trillion club -- the small group of companies worth 13 figures -- the stock needs to climb only about 11% from here. After the run it has been on, more than quadrupling off its 52-week low, that no longer sounds far-fetched.

So could AMD close the final stretch and cross $1 trillion before the year is out?

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

Where the growth comes from

What's powering AMD isn't its long-standing business in personal-computer and gaming chips, steady as that has become. It is the data center -- and, within it, the AI accelerators (the specialized graphics processing units, or GPUs ) it sells to companies building out artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure.

In the first quarter of 2026, AMD's data center revenue rose 57% year over year to about $5.8 billion -- more than half of the company's $10.3 billion in total sales, and up sharply from a business a fraction of this size a few years ago. AI accelerators make up a substantial piece of that data center total, and sales of those accelerators grew by a strong double-digit percentage year over year. In other words, the fastest-growing part of AMD -- the data center -- is now also its largest.

Zoom out to the full year, and the trajectory looks just as steep. AMD grew 2025 revenue 34% to $34.6 billion and more than doubled its bottom line, with earnings up 164%. Its newest MI350 accelerators are ramping into large customers now, a next-generation MI450 part is on the way, and the company has landed commitments from hyperscale customers for multiple gigawatts of computing capacity. That kind of forward demand is why investors keep pushing the stock higher.

AMD's other businesses are pulling their weight, too. Its server processors have been steadily taking share from Intel , and management now expects the overall server-processor market to top $120 billion a year by 2030 -- a market that would dwarf the company's entire sales base today. Whether that proves too optimistic or not, it captures why the market is willing to price the stock years ahead of results actually on the books.

Could it hit $1 trillion this year?

The path is credible. To reach $1 trillion, AMD needs its stock to add about 1% -- and a company growing earnings this fast, in a market this enamored with AI, can cover that ground quickly. Nvidia crossed the same mark, and then several more, on the strength of the very same demand.

Story Continues

But just because the path is credible doesn't make the stock a buy. There are risks. For instance, AMD is up against a juggernaut. And Nvidia still dominates. Additionally, another key risk is that AMD's largest customers are designing in-house chips.

In addition, the stock's valuation is already stretched. At about $554 per share, AMD trades at more than 180 times its earnings and about 75 times the earnings expected over the next year. Multiples like that bake in years of rapid growth with very little margin for a stumble.

So, could AMD hit $1 trillion in 2026?

Yes -- I think there is a fair chance, and a strong quarter or two might be all it takes. But I wouldn't buy the growth stock just because this milestone is possible. Crossing $1 trillion would make headlines, but it wouldn't make the business's underlying intrinsic value worth more than the day before. At more than 180 times earnings, AMD is priced for the accelerator boom to keep running with almost no missteps.

еҸ°иӮЎд»ҠпјҲ7пјүж—ҘйҮҚжҢ«еҚғйӨҳй»һпјҢж”¶еңЁ45,479й»һгҖӮдёүеӨ§жі•дәәеҗҲиЁҲиіЈи¶…еҸ°иӮЎ946.91е„„е…ғпјҢе…¶дёӯеӨ–иіҮзәҢз Қ547.31е„„е…ғпјҢе‘ҲйҖЈ4иіЈпјҢзҙҜиЁҲе·ІеҖ’иІЁ2470.65е„„е…ғгҖӮеҲҶжһҗеё«иЎЁзӨәпјҢжӯӨжіўиіЈеЈ“дё»иҰҒеҸҚжҳ е…ЁзҗғиӮЎеёӮеҗҢжӯҘдҝ®жӯЈпјҢеӨ–иіҮж…ӢеәҰеҒҸз©әгҖҒи¬№ж…Һдҝқе®ҲпјҢдҪҶдёҰжңӘеӨ§е№…зңӢз©әпјҢй җиЁҲеңЁеҸ°з©Қйӣ»жі•иӘӘжңғзҷ»е ҙеүҚпјҢеёӮе ҙи§Җжңӣж°Јж°ӣд»ҚжҝғгҖӮ

ж №ж“ҡиӯүдәӨжүҖе…¬еёғзұҢзўјеӢ•еҗ‘пјҢдёүеӨ§жі•дәәд»ҠеҗҲиЁҲиіЈи¶…946.91е„„е…ғгҖӮе…¶дёӯеӨ–иіҮзәҢз«ҷиіЈж–№пјҢд»Ҡж—ҘиіЈи¶…547.31е„„е…ғпјҢе·ІйҖЈзәҢ4еҖӢдәӨжҳ“ж—Ҙз«ҷеңЁиіЈж–№пјҢзҙҜиЁҲиіЈи¶…йҮ‘йЎҚйҒ”2470.65е„„е…ғгҖӮ

иіҮж·ұиӯүеҲёеҲҶжһҗеё«зҺӢе…Ҷз«ӢиЎЁзӨәпјҢд»ҠеӨ©еҸ°иӮЎиЎЁзҸҫйӣ–з„¶з–ІејұпјҢдҪҶж”ҫзңјдәһжҙІеёӮе ҙпјҢеҚ—йҹ“иӮЎеёӮи·Ңе№…жӣҙйҮҚгҖҒж—ҘиӮЎд№ҹеҗҢжӯҘиө°ејұпјҢеңЁе…ЁзҗғиӮЎеёӮеӣһжӘ”д№ӢйҡӣпјҢжі•дәәйҒёж“Үе…ҲиЎҢиӘҝзҜҖгҖҒйҷҚдҪҺжҢҒиӮЎж°ҙдҪҚеұ¬ж–јжӯЈеёёж“ҚдҪңпјҢеӨ–иіҮе°ҚеҸ°иӮЎдёҰжІ’жңүеӨӘйҒҺжӮІи§ҖгҖӮ

вҖў дёүжҳҹйӣ»еӯҗе…¬еёғз¬¬дәҢеӯЈеҲқжӯҘзҮҹжҘӯеҲ©зӣҠе№ҙеўһ19еҖҚе„Әж–јй җжңҹпјҢдҪҶиӮЎеғ№д»ҚеӨ§и·Ң6.92%пјҢеёӮе ҙиҰ–зӮәеҲ©еӨҡеҮәзӣЎгҖӮ
вҖў SKжө·еҠӣеЈ«дәҰдёӢи·Ң6.06%пјҢйЎҜзӨәAIиЁҳжҶ¶й«”дәӨжҳ“йқўиҮЁй«ҳжӘ”зҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗпјҢеёӮе ҙж“”жҶӮAIиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәиҲҮиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еғ№ж јдёҠжјІйҖҹеәҰжҺҘиҝ‘йҡҺж®өжҖ§й«ҳй»һгҖӮ

news.Title: еңӢе·ЁгҖҒзҰҫдјёе ӮгҖҒиҸҜж–°з§‘вҖҰиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж…ҳйҒӯеүІйҹӯиҸңпјҒз¶Іе“ҖиҷҹгҖҢж…ҳеҠҮйҮҚжј”гҖҚ жі•дәәжҸӯиғҢеҫҢе…Ёеӣ йҖҷд»¶дәӢ
news.Content: еҸ°иӮЎиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶йҫҚй ӯеңӢе·Ё*(2327)иҝ‘ж—ҘиӮЎеғ№еҠҮзғҲеӨ§жҙ—дёүжә«жҡ–гҖӮеңЁз¶“жӯ·д»Ҡе№ҙдёҠеҚҠе№ҙдёҖжіўжјІе№…и¶…йҒҺдёүеҖҚзҡ„й©ҡдәәзӢӮйЈҶеҫҢпјҢд»ҠпјҲ7пјүж—ҘеҚ»йҒӯйҒҮжІүйҮҚзҡ„зҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗиіЈеЈ“гҖӮеңӢе·Ёй–ӢзӣӨеҫҢдёҖи·ҜдёӢж®әпјҢжңҖзөӮж…ҳж‘”100е…ғпјҢд»Ҙи·ҢеҒңеғ№905е…ғдҪңж”¶пјҢдёҚеғ…еӨұе®ҲеҚғе…ғгҖҒжңҲз·ҡеӨ§й—ңпјҢжӣҙзӣҙжҺҘеҗһдёӢдёҖж №й»‘KжЈ’пјҢеј•зҷјеёӮе ҙиҲҮзӨҫзҫӨжҠ•иіҮдәәдёҖйҷЈе“ҖиҷҹпјҢиіӘз–‘з•¶е№ҙзҡ„гҖҢиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж…ҳеҠҮгҖҚжҳҜеҗҰеҶҚеәҰйҮҚжј”гҖӮ ж•ЈжҲ¶жғ…з·’е…©жҘөпјҢжңүдәәж„ҹж…ЁгҖҢеңӢе·Ёи·ҢеҒңе–”гҖҚгҖҒгҖҢжҒҗж…Ңж®әзӣӨпјҹгҖҚпјҢд№ҹжңүдәәиӘҚзӮәйҖҷжҳҜеҒҘеә·жҸӣжүӢгҖҒзҹӯз·ҡжҙ—зӣӨеҫҢзҡ„ж©ҹжңғпјҢеј·иӘҝгҖҢй«ҳйҡҺMLCCйңҖжұӮеҝ«йҖҹеҚҮжә«пјҢеңӢе·ЁжңүжңӣжӢҝеӨ–жәўиЁӮе–®гҖҚгҖӮ дәӢеҜҰдёҠпјҢиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж—ҸзҫӨиҝ‘ж—ҘиӮЎеғ№еҠҮзғҲеҸ—еЈ“пјҢжңҖж ёеҝғзҡ„еҺҹеӣ еңЁж–јзҹӯз·ҡжјІе№…е·ІеӨ§пјҢеёӮе ҙеңЁгҖҢеҲ©еӨҡеҮәзӣЎгҖҚзҡ„жғ…з·’дёӢеј•зҷјжі•дәәиҲҮдё»еҠӣиіҮйҮ‘зҡ„еј·зғҲзҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗиіЈеЈ“гҖӮйӣ–з„¶з”ўжҘӯеҹәжң¬йқўеҸ—жғ AIеҮәзҸҫзөҗж§ӢжҖ§зјәиІЁпјҢдҪҶеӨҡйҮҚеӨ–йғЁеҲ©з©әйҪҠзҷјпјҢе°ҺиҮҙж—ҸзҫӨд»Ҡж—ҘзҲҶзҷјйӣҶй«”и·ҢеҒңжҪ®гҖӮ зөҗж§ӢжҖ§еҲҶеҢ– ж¶ҲиІ»жҖ§йӣ»еӯҗйңҖжұӮдҫқз„¶з–Іејұ ж №ж“ҡз ”иӘҝж©ҹж§ӢйӣҶйӮҰз§‘жҠҖпјҲTrendForceпјүзҡ„жңҖж–°е ұе‘ҠжҢҮеҮәпјҢйӣ–з„¶AIдјәжңҚеҷЁиҲҮиҮӘз ”ASICжҷ¶зүҮеё¶еӢ•й«ҳйҡҺMLCCдҫӣдёҚжҮүжұӮпјҢдҪҶеҗҢжҷӮд№ҹжҸӯйңІдәҶдёҖй …йҡұжҶӮпјҡдёҖиҲ¬ж¶ҲиІ»жҖ§йӣ»еӯҗпјҲеҰӮжүӢж©ҹгҖҒзӯҶйӣ»пјүд»ҚеҸ—е…Ёзҗғй«ҳеҲ©зҺҮз’°еўғеЈ“еҲ¶пјҢзөӮз«ҜйңҖжұӮдҫқз„¶з–ІејұгҖӮ йҖҷдҪҝеҫ—й«ҳйҡҺиҲҮдҪҺйҡҺз”ўе“ҒеҮәзҸҫеҡҙйҮҚи„«йүӨгҖӮеёӮе ҙеҺҹжң¬й җжңҹиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶жңғиҝҺдҫҶгҖҢе…ЁйқўжҖ§еӨ§еҫ©з”ҰгҖҚпјҢдҪҶж•ёж“ҡжҸӯйңІжҷҜж°Јеғ…еұ¬ж–јгҖҢзөҗж§ӢжҖ§еҲҶеҢ–гҖҚпјҢжңӘиғҪе…ЁйқўйҪҠжҸҡпјҢзӣҙжҺҘеӢ•жҗ–дәҶйғЁеҲҶзҹӯз·ҡеӨҡй ӯзҡ„дҝЎеҝғгҖӮ жі•дәәзұҢзўјй¬ҶеӢ• еӨ–иіҮиӘҝеҚҮзӣ®жЁҷеғ№еҸҚжҲҗдёӢи»ҠиӘҳеӣ  з”ұж–јеңӢе·ЁиӮЎеғ№еңЁзҹӯз·ҡдёҠйқўиҮЁжҘөеӨ§жјІе№…пјҢеёӮе ҙеӨҡй ӯж°Јж°ӣеңЁжӯ·еҸІй«ҳжӘ”еҚҖиҪүи¶Ёи¬№ж…ҺгҖӮеҫһиҝ‘жңҹдёүеӨ§жі•дәәзҡ„йҖІеҮәзұҢзўјеҸҜд»ҘзҷјзҸҫпјҢжң¬еңҹжҠ•дҝЎжі•дәәиҝ‘жңҹеҮәзҸҫжҳҺйЎҜзҡ„гҖҢзөҗеёіжёӣзўјгҖҚеӨ§жҸӣиӮЎпјҢиҝ‘5ж—Ҙе…§жҠ•дҝЎзҳӢзӢӮжӢӢе”®й«ҳйҒ”14,269ејөпјҢиҮӘзҮҹе•Ҷд№ҹеҗҢжӯҘз«ҷеңЁиіЈж–№гҖӮеңЁжң¬еңҹжі•дәәзұҢзўјйқўйӣҶй«”й¬ҶеӢ•дёӢпјҢеј•зҷјиіҮйҮ‘йҖЈйҺ–йҖҖе ҙжҒҗж…ҢпјҢе°ҺиҮҙеңӢе·ЁгҖҒзҰҫдјёе Ӯ(3026)гҖҒиҸҜж–°з§‘(2492)зӯүиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶жҢҮжЁҷиӮЎйӣҶй«”еһӮж·ҡи§ёеҸҠи·ҢеҒңгҖӮ иҝ‘ж—ҘзҫҺзі»иҲҮжң¬еңҹжі•дәәзӣёз№јзҷјеёғжЁӮи§Җе ұе‘ҠпјҢзңӢеҘҪеңӢе·Ё7жңҲиө·е…ЁйқўиӘҝжјІе…Ёзі»еҲ—йӣ»е®№з”ўе“Ғеғ№ж јпјҢз”ҡиҮій«ҳе–Ҡзӣ®жЁҷеғ№1,490е…ғгҖӮз„¶иҖҢпјҢйҖҷзЁ®жҘөеәҰжЁӮи§Җзҡ„еёӮе ҙиЁҠжҒҜпјҢеҸҚиҖҢиҲҮеӨ–иіҮе ұе‘Ҡе”ұеҸҚиӘҝпјҢжҲҗзӮәе…§иіҮгҖҒдё»еҠӣиҲҮеӨ–иіҮеӨ§е’–гҖҢеҸҚеҗ‘е°ҚеҖ’гҖҒйҖўй«ҳдёӢи»ҠгҖҚзҡ„жңҖдҪіеҘ‘ж©ҹгҖӮйҖҷе°ҺиҮҙеҲ©еӨҡиҰӢе ұеҫҢиӮЎеғ№еҸҚиҖҢйҖЈзәҢе…©ж—ҘйҮҚжҢ«пјҢеҪўжҲҗз¶“е…ёзҡ„гҖҢеҲ©еӨҡеҮәзӣЎгҖҚиө°еӢўгҖӮ еңӢйҡӣз§‘жҠҖиӮЎйңҮзӣӘиҲҮзі»зөұжҖ§иіҮйҮ‘ж’Өйӣў йҷӨдәҶж—ҸзҫӨе…§йғЁеӣ зҙ пјҢеӨ–йғЁз’°еўғд№ҹзӣёз•¶еҡҙеі»гҖӮе…ЁзҗғеёӮе ҙе°ҚAIжҷ¶зүҮзЎ¬й«”йңҖжұӮеӮіеҮәйӣ¶жҳҹйӣңйҹіпјҢеҠ дёҠдәһжҙІдё»иҰҒиӮЎеёӮпјҲеҰӮйҹ“иӮЎзӣӨдёӯи§ёзҷјзҶ”ж–·ж©ҹеҲ¶гҖҒж—ҘиӮЎеӨ§и·ҢпјүжіўеӢ•еҠҮзғҲпјҢеј•зҷјеҚҖеҹҹжҖ§иіҮйҮ‘зҡ„йҖЈйҺ–жӢӢе”®гҖӮ еңЁз§‘жҠҖзЎ¬й«”йӣңйҹіеӮіеҮәд№ӢдёӢпјҢеҸ°иӮЎеӨ§зӣӨеӣ ж•ҙй«”йӣ»еӯҗж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎдҝ®жӯЈиҖҢеҠҮзғҲеӣһжӘ”гҖӮзҹӯз·ҡиіҮйҮ‘зӮәдәҶе°ӢжұӮйҒҝйҡӘпјҢйӣҶй«”ж’ӨеҮәе…ҲеүҚжңҖзӮәеј·еӢўзҡ„PCBгҖҒеҠҹзҺҮеҚҠе°Һй«”иҲҮиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶зӯүйӣ»еӯҗйӣ¶зө„д»¶ж—ҸзҫӨпјҢиҪүеҗ‘з”ҹжҠҖзӯүйҳІзҰҰеһӢжқҝеЎҠйҒҝйҡӘгҖӮ й•·з·ҡеҹәжң¬йқўд»Қз©©еҒҘ е„ҳз®ЎиӮЎеғ№зҹӯжңҹйқўиҮЁзұҢзўјйқўзҡ„еҠҮзғҲдҝ®жӯЈпјҢдҪҶеҫһеҹәжң¬йқўдҫҶзңӢпјҢеңӢе·Ёзҡ„зҮҹж”¶иЎЁзҸҫдҫқиҲҠдә®зңјгҖӮеҸ—жғ ж–јAIдјәжңҚеҷЁиҲҮй«ҳз«ҜжҮүз”Ёзҡ„еј·еӢҒжӢүиІЁпјҢеңӢе·ЁеңЁ2026е№ҙз¬¬1еӯЈзҮҹж”¶еҜ«дёӢзҙ„12е„„зҫҺе…ғзҡ„жӯ·еҸІж–°й«ҳзҙҖйҢ„гҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢжңҖж–°е…¬еёғзҡ„5жңҲзҮҹж”¶йҒ”150.58е„„е…ғпјҢе№ҙеўһзҺҮй«ҳйҒ”47.46%пјҢеёӮе ҙзӣ®еүҚжӯЈеҜҶеҲҮеұҸжҒҜзӯүеҫ…еҚіе°Үе…¬еёғзҡ„6жңҲзҮҹж”¶ж•ёж“ҡгҖӮ еңӢе·Ёиҝ‘е№ҙз©ҚжҘөйҖІиЎҢзөҗж§ӢиҪүеһӢпјҢй«ҳйҡҺеёӮе ҙпјҲеҢ…еҗ«AIгҖҒи»Ҡз”ЁгҖҒе·ҘиҰҸгҖҒиҲӘеӨӘйҶ«зҷӮпјүзҮҹж”¶еҚ жҜ”е·ІеӨ§е№…жӢүй«ҳиҮі75%пјҢеӨ§дёӯиҸҜеҚҖзҮҹж”¶жҜ”йҮҚеүҮйҷҚиҮі25%д»ҘдёӢпјҢжҲҗеҠҹи·іи„«йҒҺеҺ»еӮізөұж¶ҲиІ»жҖ§йӣ»еӯҗжҷҜж°ЈеҫӘз’°зҡ„жқҹзёӣгҖӮзӣ®еүҚAIзӣёй—ңжҮүз”Ёзҡ„зҮҹж”¶еҚ жҜ”е·ІйҒ”зёҪзҮҹж”¶зҡ„15%гҖӮ жіЁж„Ҹзҹӯз·ҡзұҢзўјиҲҮж¶ІеҶ·и®Ҡж•ё

news.Title: Four states seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties in child social media addiction trial, Meta says
news.Content: Four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from Meta over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to be addictive to children and withheld information from the public about the harms the apps pose to young users, Meta said in a court filing on Monday. The case is being brought byВ California, Colorado, Kentucky and New Jersey. Meta disclosed the trillion-dollar figure in its response to the attorneys general filings on how penalties should be calculated if the states win at the trial set to begin next month in Oakland, California. The company said the number, which is near Meta's market capitalization of around $1.5 trillion, was not supported by the evidence. "A sanction of that size has no analog in the history of consumer protection enforcement," the company said in the filing. Judge Lets States Pursue Claims That Meta Designed Facebook And Instagram To Addict Children Fox Business reached out to Meta for further comment. Read On The Fox Business App The states' filings are sealed, but they said during a hearing last month that they were calculating the penalties by multiplying the number of violations by fine amounts established by state law. They said the number of violations is based on the estimated number of young users impacted by Meta's social media platforms. Nearly 30 states have sued Meta in federal court , with most of them claiming the company violated the federal Children's Online Privacy Protection Act by collecting data from children without proper parental consent. The trial will address all claims brought under that law, as well as the four states' allegations that the tech giant violated their state laws aimed at protecting consumers by misleading the public about the safety of their platforms. Meta has denied the allegations, saying the attorneys general lack вҖҢevidence that it вҒ misled the public about its platforms' alleged addictiveness since social media addiction is not an established psychiatric condition. The company has also pushed back on accusations that it violated the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act because it marketed Facebook and Instagram to a wider audience and not only children under 13. Google's Youtube Reaches Settlement In Lawsuit Alleging Child Social Media Addiction Another 14 states have brought claims under their own laws, which will be heard at a separate trial next year. Late last month, U.S. District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers rejected Meta's bid to dismiss the case, saying factual disputes remained over whether its social media platforms were addictive, whether вҖӢthe company falsely denied it designed them that way and whether it "partially" marketed the platforms вҖӢtowards children. Story Continues "We strongly disagree with these allegations and are confident the evidence will show our longstanding commitment to supporting young people," a Meta spokesperson said in a statement to Fox Business at the time. Meta, Snapchat, YouTube and TikTok are facing thousands of lawsuits in both federal and state court over allegations they knowingly designed their platforms to be addictive to young users, contributing to a mental health crisis. New Mexico was the first state to go to trial , with a jury awarding it $375 million in March after finding Meta had misled consumers in the state. A judge in New Mexico is also weighing the second portion of the state's case, which asks for additional damages and a court order instructing the company to make changes to Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp. Reuters contributed to this report. Original article source: Four states seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties in child social media addiction trial, Meta says Meta said four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from the company over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to addict child users. Meta said four states are seeking $1.4 trillion in penalties from the company over claims that the social media giant designed Facebook and Instagram to addict child users. Fox Business reached out to Meta for further comment.

news.Title: The Stock Market Just Finished Its Best Quarter in Years. Here's What History Says Is Coming Next.
news.Content:
The S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) was up nearly 15% in the second quarter of 2026, its best performance since the COVID-19 rebound in 2020. After an up-and-down first quarter, the S&P 500 was up roughly 10% for the entire first half, putting it on pace for its fourth consecutive year of double-digit gains.

History shows those kinds of streaks are rare. Most notably, the S&P 500 put up five consecutive double-digit-return years from 1995 to 1999. Of course, most people know that streak ended with the tech bubble bursting and resulted in three consecutive years of negative double-digit returns.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

Naturally, there's some skepticism about how long these kinds of returns can last. The artificial intelligence (AI) boom is still driving revenue and earnings growth, but high inflation, slowing growth, possible Federal Reserve rate hikes, and the geopolitical environment are all current risks.

Earnings growth will be the driver in the short term

Current FactSet estimates call for 24% earnings growth in 2026 and another 17% in 2027. While anything can certainly happen, it's difficult to imagine stock prices correcting significantly with that kind of earnings growth in the background.

It might be another story if valuations were excessive. The Shiller CAPE ratio, which measures stock prices against 10-year inflation-adjusted earnings, is near an all-time high. But the forward price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio for the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF (NYSEMKT: VOO) is only around 23. That's higher than its long-term average, but below its 2024 and 2025 peaks.

With earnings growing strongly and valuations at reasonable levels, it's easy to make the case that stock prices could keep pushing higher.

Long-term investors should remain undeterred

Even if short-term conditions were more challenging, long-term investors should stay the course. The S&P 500 has averaged a 10% annual return over the past century. Any given year can be up or down, but history shows that a longer holding period generally translates to a greater chance of success.

Here's a good example. Over the past decade, the Vanguard S&P 500 ETF delivered an average annual return of more than 15%. That decade happened to include a 20% correction in late 2018, a sharp drawdown of more than 30% during the beginning of the COVID pandemic, and the 2022 bear market, which sent stocks down by roughly 24%.

Story Continues

Yet despite all of this, investors were rewarded with above-average returns for the full holding period, if they remained invested throughout.

That's the key. Buy-and-hold investing requires holding even in rough market conditions. Many of folks head for the exits after stock prices have already declined, only to miss the subsequent rebound. In many cases, investors damage their own long-term returns more than the stock market ever did just by trying to time the market.

Even after such a strong bull-market rally that's still alive, the future looks bright for those willing to stay the course.

news.Title: Google, RWE back Proxima Fusion in вӮ¬411 million financing round
news.Content:
July 7 (Reuters) - Magnetic fusion start-up Proxima Fusion has raised вӮ¬411 million ($469.69 million) from investors вҖҢincluding Alphabet's Google and German utility RWE вҖҢas part of a financing round, the Munich-based start-up вҖӢsaid on Tuesday.

вҖў "Proxima's financing demonstrates that Europe can not only invent breakthrough technologies, but also build globally competitive companies around them," Francesco Sciortino, Proxima вҖҢFusion's chief executive, вҒ said in a statement

вҖў The round was led by XTX Ventures and East вҒ X Ventures, with RWE and Google as strategic investors, the company said

вҖў It added that вҖӢthe financing вҖӢround brings Proxima Fusion's вҖӢvaluation to вӮ¬2.4 billion ($2.7 вҖҢbillion)

вҖў German utility company RWE invested вӮ¬25 million euros in the funding round

вҖў RWE signed an agreement with Proxima to partner on building the first stellarator fusion power plant on the site of вҖҢa former nuclear fission вҖӢpower plant in Gundremmingen, Bavaria

вҖў вҖӢUnlike the burning вҖӢof fossil fuels or the fission вҖҢprocess of existing nuclear вҖӢpower plants, nuclear вҖӢfusion offers the possibility of abundant energy without pollution, radioactive waste or greenhouse gases, вҖӢreplicating with вҖҢlasers or magnets the reaction that fuels вҖӢthe sun

($1 = 0.8750 euros)

(Reporting by Danny Callaghan, вҖӢEditing by Friederike Heine)

news.Title: Is the SpaceX IPO Officially Overhyped?
news.Content:
Space Exploration Technologies ' (NASDAQ: SPCX) (SpaceX) initial public offering (IPO) was undoubtedly the most hyped IPO in recent stock market memory. It didn't disappoint, either, setting the record for the largest IPO in stock market history, with an initial valuation of around $1.77 trillion. Now, it's valued at over $2.1 trillion as of market close on July 2.

In the short time since its June 12 IPO, SpaceX's stock is relatively flat (from the price the average investor could have paid), experiencing roller coaster ups and downs. Still, there's a lot of hype surrounding both the company and the stock -- but is it overhyped? It depends on how you define it.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

SpaceX is going just beyond rockets

SpaceX is transforming from a rocket launch company into a respectable conglomerate with thriving subsidiaries under its wing. It has its core launch business, which is the largest in the world; Starlink is growing impressively and providing internet to some of the most remote places globally; and X's (formerly Twitter) parent company, xAI, has artificial intelligence infrastructure that many tech companies would give their right arm for.

Much of the appeal of SpaceX's business, however, is its ambitious plan for the future. Moonshot plans (no pun intended) like data centers in space and everyday human space travel spark the interest of investors and Elon Musk fans who see SpaceX's trajectory mirroring that of Musk's other company, Tesla . Tesla's returns have been just above the S&P 500 's over the past five years, but it's up over 30,600% since its July 2010 IPO.

We can't predict how SpaceX's stock will perform, but it has businesses worth being excited about.

Is SpaceX's IPO overhyped?

If by overhyped, you mean that SpaceX is all promise and nothing to show, then I would say no, it's not. If by overhyped you mean extremely expensive for a business that is currently operating at a loss and built on (very) long-term promises, then I would say yes.

Taking SpaceX's $18.7 billion in revenue in 2025 and its $2.1 trillion valuation, it's currently trading at 112 times its sales (P/S ratio). For comparison, here are the P/S ratios for some notable companies and their year-over-year revenue growth last quarter:

Company

P/S Ratio

Latest Revenue Growth

Broadcom

23.3

Nvidia

18.8

Alphabet

10.4

Apple

10.1

Amazon

Story Continues

Source: YCharts. P/S ratios as of market close on July 2.

These aren't apples-to-apples comparisons, but the larger point is how much of a premium you'd be paying for SpaceX's stock right now, even before seeing one quarterly earnings report as a public company.

This isn't a knock on SpaceX as a company by any means, but a great company doesn't always make a great investment. If you already own shares, I would hold onto them (you should be focused on the long term either way), but if you're thinking about making your first investment, I would wait it out a bit.

news.Title: еҸ°иӮЎиЎҢжғ…её¶еӢ•ж°‘з”ҹж¶ҲиІ» йҰ–еӯЈеңӢе…§ж¶ҲиІ»еҜҰиіӘжҲҗй•·4.31%
news.Content:
7ж—ҘеҸ°иӮЎй–ӢзӣӨдёҠжјІпјҢйҡЁеҫҢжҖҘжҢ«дёӢж®әзҝ»й»‘пјҢдёҖеәҰйҒ”4иҗ¬6527й»һпјҢз·ҠжҺҘи‘—еңЁдё»еҠӣжӢүжҠ¬д№ӢдёӢеҶҚжӢүеӣһпјҢзӣӨдёӯжңҖй«ҳдёҖеәҰйҒ”4иҗ¬6967й»һпјҢе®ӣеҰӮйӣІйң„йЈӣи»ҠгҖҢдёҠжІ–дёӢжҙ—гҖҚгҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»еүҮз¶ӯжҢҒй«ҳй»һйңҮзӣӘпјҢзӣӨдёӯжңҖй«ҳйҒ”2500е…ғгҖҒжҲҗж”Ҝж’җеҠӣйҒ“гҖӮ

й„°иҝ‘дәһиӮЎпјҢж—Ҙз¶“жҢҮж•ёе’Ңйҹ“еңӢз¶ңеҗҲиӮЎеғ№жҢҮж•ёеүҮйӣҷйӣҷдёӢж®әгҖҒй–ӢдҪҺиө°дҪҺгҖӮиҝ‘жңҹеҸ°иӮЎгҖҢзүӣж°ЈжІ–еӨ©гҖҚпјҢд№ҹеё¶еӢ•еӨ–жәўж•ҲжҮүпјҢдҪҶеӯёз•Ңд№ҹи§ҖеҜҹеёӮе ҙзҶұйҢўеӨҡж•ёжІ’жңүеӣһжӯёеҲ°е…§йңҖеёӮе ҙгҖӮ

дәһеӨӘе•Ҷе·ҘзёҪжңғеҹ·иЎҢй•·йӮұйҒ”з”ҹиЎЁзӨәпјҢгҖҢйӮЈеӣ зӮәеҸ°иӮЎеүөй«ҳпјҢдёҚд»ЈиЎЁе…Ёж°‘йғҪиіәеҲ°йҢўпјҢйӮЈиІЎеҜҢдё»иҰҒйӣҶдёӯеңЁAIдҫӣжҮүйҸҲи·ҹиӮЎзҘЁжҠ•иіҮж—ҸзҫӨпјҢиҖҢдё”еҫҲеӨҡзҡ„зҚІеҲ©еҸҲеҶҚз№јзәҢжҠ•е…ҘиӮЎеёӮгҖӮгҖҚ

з·ҜеүөйӣҶеңҳи‘ЈдәӢй•·жһ—жҶІйҠҳиӘҚзӮәпјҢгҖҢпјҲеӨ–жәўж•ҲжҮүпјүжңүзҡ„жҷӮеҖҷпјҢдҪ йӮ„жҳҜиҰҒжңүдёҖдәӣжҷӮй–“зҡ„йҖҷзЁ®йҶһйҮҖпјҢз•¶з„¶з¬¬дәҢеҖӢе°ұжҳҜиӘӘпјҢеҰӮжһңиғҪеӨ еҶҚй…ҚеҗҲж”ҝзӯ–дёҠзҡ„жҺЁеӢ•пјҢжҜ”еҰӮиӘӘеғҸеүҚдёҖйҷЈеӯҗзҫҺеңӢд№ҹеңЁжҖқиҖғе°ұжҳҜиӘӘпјҢжҠҠдјҒжҘӯе…ҚзЁ…зҡ„й–ҖжӘ»еҶҚжӢүй«ҳгҖӮгҖҚ

news.Title: Synopsys to cut chip fab manufacturing control software in shift to AI design, sources say
news.Content:
By Cynthia Kim and Hyunjoo Jin

SEOUL, July 7 (Reuters) - U.S. chip design giant Synopsys plans to stop offering a suite of manufacturing process control software used by global semiconductor makers, six sources briefed on the matter said, as it seeks to вҖҢdivert resources to higher-margin offerings such as AI design.

Synopsys in April and May informed more than 10 chipmakers including Samsung Electronics, вҖҢSK Hynix, Kioxia Holdings Corp and Qorvo Inc about the "end of life" move that means Synopsys will not provide future new versions and will only carry out maintenance obligations, two of вҖӢthe sources said.

The affected products include the Equipment Engineering System (EES) and Fault Detection and Classification (FDC), a set of automation software that acts as the central nervous system of semiconductor fabrication plants to monitor and detect any anomalies before they cascade into costly defects, the two sources said.

The company has already laid off a few dozen staff, said three of the sources, one of whom added that Synopsys plans to conclude talks with each chipmaker on maintenance obligations by вҖҢJuly.

Synopsys is discontinuing some legacy manufacturing analytics products to вҒ focus resources on the highest-value products, a company spokesperson told Reuters in a statement, without naming the products.

The move highlights a changing balance in the semiconductor software industry, where vendors are investing more heavily in AI design technologies вҒ while some chipmakers increasingly build manufacturing software in-house.

"While we are discontinuing certain manufacturing analytics products, which are older diagnostic tools not in our customers' critical paths of production, we continue to invest in new capabilities in this area of our portfolio and are honoring all existing contractual and support obligations as we take this action," the Synopsys spokesperson said.

The company declined to вҖӢdisclose вҖӢwhether job cuts were involved.

CUSTOMERS LOOK TO DEVELOP IN-HOUSE TOOLS

Synopsys began offering the EES вҖӢproduct after acquiring semiconductor manufacturing solutions from South Korean вҖҢfirm BISTel in 2021 for an undisclosed amount.

One of the sources said Synopsys had been wanting to be free of support and maintenance obligations related to IP services and to reallocate engineers to high-margin AI design. Synopsys completed its $35 billion purchase of engineering software firm Ansys in 2025.

That person and a second source said the software's removal risked causing some declines in production yields for chipmakers as the software needed to be constantly maintained, updated and patched.

Story Continues

However, four of the other sources said they did not expect an impact on production at major chipmakers.

One of the sources said the вҖҢdecision was also taken partly because enhancing the EES service required chipmakers to share вҖӢtightly-held manufacturing data. Some clients like Samsung were also developing their own in-house tools, impacting вҖӢthe competitiveness of Synopsys' offerings, two sources said.

A Samsung spokesperson вҖӢconfirmed the end-of-life decision and said active discussions were underway with Synopsys regarding the product's sunset. Samsung had established compatible вҖҢalternatives and there would be "no negative impact on production," the вҖӢspokesperson said when asked if production вҖӢyields could decline.

SK Hynix declined to comment. Kioxia and Qorvo did not respond to requests for comment.

Synopsys has for decades been one of the main suppliers of software used in determining how to arrange the tens of billions of transistors that make up chips, which вҖӢcan be 2,000 times smaller than the width вҖҢof a strand of human hair.

In March, Synopsys introduced a technology it said would pave the way toward AI agents taking вҖӢover many of the tasks in creating chips.

(Reporting by Cynthia Kim and Hyunjoo Jin in Seoul, Wen-Yee Lee in Taipei and вҖӢStephen Nellis in San Francisco; Editing by Brenda Goh and Jamie Freed)

news.Title: Tesla's Robotaxi Just Launched in Miami -- Its First City Outside Texas and California. Can It Rescue the Stock?
news.Content: Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Robotaxis began picking up passengers in Miami on Friday -- the company's first market outside Texas and California. The service begins modestly, in a geofenced slice of western Miami-Dade County reportedly running from West Miami toward Doral, with downtown and Miami Beach left out for now. The day before, Tesla reported 480,126 second-quarter deliveries, up about 25% year over year -- and the stock fell 7.5% anyway. But the stock is regaining some ground on Monday as investors hope the company's Robotaxi business may begin to gain steam. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В» Is the Robotaxi business scaling fast enough to be that something? The map is filling in The Robotaxi service is barely a year old. Tesla launched it in Austin last summer with safety monitors aboard, began removing them, and has been layering on markets since. Miami is a sensible next test bed, too: flat roads, year-round driving weather, and heavy visitor traffic that leans on ride-hailing. Notably, Miami extends the Robotaxi footprint beyond Tesla's home states for the first time. According to the company's first-quarter update, Tesla lists Austin, Dallas, and Houston as ramping unsupervised, operates with safety drivers in the San Francisco Bay Area, and lists Miami, Orlando, Tampa, Phoenix, and Las Vegas as markets with preparations underway. Friday converted the first of those five from planned to live. But Tesla still hasn't yet reached meaningful scale -- at least not enough to significantly enhance the bull case for the stock. The Austin fleet is still reportedly measured by the dozens of vehicles, with the unsupervised portion of this fleet smaller still. And early riders across markets have described long waits and occasional software misfires. Additionally, availability remains limited to specific service areas in Tesla's dedicated Robotaxi app -- another sign this remains a controlled rollout rather than a mass-market service. What a city launch can't fix The market's frustration that has left shares in the red for the year arguably isn't about Tesla's expanding Robotaxi service. The company's first-quarter operating margin was just 4.2%, on revenue that grew 16%. Additionally, the stock's valuation remains difficult to justify. With $1.10 in earnings per share over the past 12 months, the stock trades at more than 380 times earnings -- a price that arguably makes sense only if autonomy becomes a large, profitable business on a reasonable timeline. Growth in the teens isn't what investors are paying for. Autonomy is. Story Continues Ultimately, a launch in Miami shows progress. But investors still need more concrete evidence to know Robotaxi can become material to results soon. Tesla hasn't disclosed Robotaxi revenue, ride volumes, utilization, or per-mile costs. Investors, therefore, are still mostly left in the dark. We'll likely know more on July 22, when Tesla is scheduled to report earnings. If Tesla opts to provide more data on the Robotaxi program and more details about its plans and its potential economics, investors will have more data points to gauge just how much this Robotaxi business may be worth to the overall business. So, can Miami rescue the stock? Based on the stock's sharp rebound on Monday, the initial phases of a rescue may already be underway. But shares are still down almost 7% year to date. To fully recover, Tesla will likely need more upbeat news on its Robotaxi program -- news that starts making it sound like the program will soon start contributing meaningfully to Tesla's financial results. The rollout cadence is encouraging -- five markets live and four more queued -- and Tesla is executing the expansion it laid out for investors. But with a price-to-earnings ratio of about 380, the growth stock needs autonomy to start showing up in the financial statements, not just on maps. We just issued 'double down' alerts on 3 stocks вҖ” find out ifВ Tesla made our list Ever feel like you missed the boat in buying the most successful stocks? Then you'll want to hear this. On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a "Double Down" stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you're worried you've already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it's too late. And the numbers speak for themselves: Nvidia: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2009, you'd have $505,952 !* Apple: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2008, you'd have $58,823 !* Netflix: if you invested $1,000 when we doubled down in 2004, you'd have $418,761 !* Right now, we're issuing "Double Down" alerts for three incredible companies, available when you join Stock Advisor , and there may not be another chance like this anytime soon. news.Title: зёҫж•Ҳ1иЎЁзңӢгҖӢзӣёдҝЎеҸ°иӮЎй•·жңҹеҗ‘дёҠ иҲҮе…¶иІ·0050зӮәдҪ•дёҚиІ·жӯЈ2иіәжӣҙеӨҡпјҹ1ејө1иҗ¬е°ұиғҪиіә2еҖҚ
news.Content:
еҸ°иӮЎеңЁ4иҗ¬еӨҡй»һй«ҳжӘ”пјҢеҫҲеӨҡдәәеҖҹйҢўзӮ’иӮЎпјҢж§“жЎҝеһӢETFжӯЈ2е°ұеҫҲеҸ—жӯЎиҝҺпјҢд»ҘиҝҪжұӮе–®ж—ҘжӯЈеҗ‘2еҖҚе ұй…¬зӮәзӣ®жЁҷпјҢдёҚж•—ж•ҷдё»йҷійҮҚйҠҳиЎЁзӨәпјҢж—ўз„¶зӣёдҝЎеҸ°иӮЎй•·жңҹеҗ‘дёҠпјҢиҲҮе…¶жҠ•иіҮ0050дёҚеҰӮиІ·жӯЈ2иіәжӣҙеӨҡпјҢиҝ‘5е№ҙ00685LжјІ574%пјҢжҳҜ0050жјІ257%зҡ„2еҖҚеӨҡпјҢе…§жүЈд№ҹдҪҺпјҢйӮ„жҳҜжңҖдҫҝе®ңжӯЈ2пјҢ1ејөеғ…1.2иҗ¬еӨҡе…ғпјҢеҫҲйҒ©еҗҲиӮЎзҒҪжҷӮеҠ зўјпјҢеӣ зӮәеӨ§зӣӨжҢҮж•ёдёҚжңғжӯёйӣ¶пјҢгҖҢи·Ңи¶Ҡж·ұе°ұеҪҲи¶Ҡй«ҳгҖҚеҸҜд»ҘиіәжӣҙеӨҡгҖӮ

йҷійҮҚйҠҳеңЁиҮүжӣёиЎЁзӨәпјҢдҪ дёҖе®ҡиҒҪйҒҺпјҡеҰӮжһңдҪ зӣёдҝЎеҸ°зҒЈиӮЎеёӮй•·жңҹеҫҖдёҠпјҢе°ұе®ҡжңҹе®ҡйЎҚиІ·е…ғеӨ§еҸ°зҒЈ50(0050)пјҢй•·жңҹжҠ•иіҮпјҒйӮЈйәјдҪ жңүжғійҒҺе—Һпјҹж—ўз„¶дҪ зӣёдҝЎиӮЎеёӮй•·жңҹеҗ‘дёҠпјҢзӮәдҪ•дёҚиІ·жӯЈ2дҫҶиіәжӣҙеӨҡпјҹ

и®“жҲ‘еҖ‘з”Ёж•ёеӯ—иӘӘи©ұпјҢзөұиЁҲйҒҺеҺ»5е№ҙпјҢеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёжӯЈдәҢETFжјІе№…зҡҶи¶…йҒҺ0050зҡ„2еҖҚпјҢиҖҢдё”зҫӨзӣҠиҮәзҒЈеҠ ж¬ҠжӯЈ2(00685L)иЎЁзҸҫжӣҙеӢқйҒҺе…¶е®ғжӯЈ2 ETFе–”пјҒж—ўз„¶йғҪжҳҜиҝҪи№ӨеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёпјҢзӮәдҪ•00685LзҚЁеҚ й°Ій ӯпјҹ

з”ұж–јжӯЈ2еһӢETFйғҪжҳҜжҢҒжңүжңҹиІЁпјҢжүҖд»Ҙз¶“зҗҶиІ»йҖҡеёёжҜ”ијғй«ҳпјҢдҫӢеҰӮе…ғеӨ§еҸ°зҒЈ50жӯЈ2(00631L)жҳҜ1%пјҢдҪҶжҳҜзҫӨзӣҠжҠ•дҝЎи®“еҲ©зөҰжҠ•иіҮдәәпјҢ00685Lзҡ„з¶“зҗҶиІ»еғ…0.3%пјҢжҳҜжӯЈ2еһӢETFдёӯжңҖдҪҺзҡ„пјҢжүҖд»Ҙй•·жңҹе ұй…¬иЎЁзҸҫе°ұй«ҳйҒҺе…¶е®ғжӯЈ2еһӢETFгҖӮи«ӢиЁҳдҪҸпјҡй•·жңҹжҠ•иіҮпјҢдҪҺжҲҗжң¬еҫҲйҮҚиҰҒгҖӮ

зҸҫеңЁеӨ§зӣӨеңЁ4иҗ¬5еҚғй»һзҡ„й«ҳиҷ•пјҢжңғжңүеҚұйҡӘе—ҺпјҹиҰҒзңӢиӯ·еңӢзҘһеұұе•ҠпјҢзӣ®еүҚеҸ°з©Қйӣ»(2330)еҚ еӨ§зӣӨйҮҚзӮә41.65%(2026/6/30)пјҢжі•дәәй җдј°д»Ҡе№ҙEPSй«ҳйҒ”108.2е…ғпјҢијғеҺ»е№ҙжҲҗй•·и¶…йҒҺ6жҲҗпјҢеӨ–иіҮе–ҠеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зӣ®жЁҷеғ№3,500е…ғгҖӮжүҖд»ҘпјҢеҸӘиҰҒеҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҚІеҲ©жҲҗй•·пјҢеӨ§зӣӨеҜҰеңЁжҳҜжІ’жңүжӮІи§Җзҡ„зҗҶз”ұгҖӮ

4жӘ”жӯЈ2еһӢETFжҖҺйәјйҒёпјҹз•¶з„¶жҢ‘е ұй…¬зҺҮжңҖй«ҳгҖҒжҲҗжң¬жңҖдҪҺзҡ„

е…¶еҜҰжӯЈ2еһӢETFдёҚжҳҜеҸӘиғҪеӨ й•·жңҹжҢҒжңүпјҢйҷійҮҚйҠҳиӘӘпјҢеңЁиӮЎзҒҪжҷӮд№ҹеҫҲе–ңжӯЎз”ЁжӯЈ2иіәеғ№е·®пјҒеҺ»е№ҙзҫҺеңӢжҢ‘иө·й—ңзЁ…жҲ°пјҢеҸ°иӮЎеӨ§зӣӨи·ҢеҲ°еңӢе®үеҹәйҮ‘йҖІе ҙиӯ·зӣӨпјҢйҖҷжҷӮеҖҷе°ұжҳҜиІ·еҠ ж¬ҠжӯЈ2йҖІе ҙпјҢеҺҹеӣ еҫҲз°Ўе–®пјҢеӣ зӮәзӣёдҝЎеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёдёҚжңғжӯёйӣ¶пјҢеңӢйҡӣеӣ зҙ и®“иӮЎеёӮйҮҚжҢ«пјҢе°ұжҳҜж’ҝдҫҝе®ңзҡ„еҘҪжҷӮж©ҹпјҒ

дҪ жҮүи©Ід№ҹжңүиҒҪйҒҺгҖҢиіәеҲ°жҢҮж•ёпјҢеҚ»иі еғ№е·®гҖҚпјҢиӮЎзҒҪжҷӮеҫҲеӨҡдәәжҖҘи‘—жҗ¶зҹӯз·ҡпјҢеҸҜжҳҜйӮЈйәјеӨҡиӮЎзҘЁиҰҒиІ·е“ӘдёҖжӘ”пјҹеҰӮжһңе°„йЈӣйҸўдәӮиІ·зҡ„и©ұпјҢе°ұз®—е°ҮдҫҶеӨ§зӣӨзҝ»жҸҡпјҢдҪ зҡ„иӮЎзҘЁд№ҹжңүеҸҜиғҪиі йҢўе–”пјҒжүҖд»ҘпјҢиӮЎзҒҪжҷӮйғҪдёҚжңғиҠұжҷӮй–“еҺ»йҒёиӮЎпјҢзӣҙжҺҘиІ·йҖІеӨ§зӣӨзҡ„йўЁйҡӘеҸҚиҖҢжҳҜжңҖдҪҺзҡ„гҖӮ

иҖҢдё”иӮЎзҒҪжҷӮдёҖе®ҡиІ·жӯЈ2пјҢеӣ зӮәгҖҢи·Ңеҫ—ж·ұе°ұеҪҲеҫ—й«ҳгҖҚпјҢйҖҷжҳҜдёҖеҖӢж•ёеӯёе°Ҹеёёиӯҳе–”гҖӮеҒҮиЁӯеӨ§зӣӨдёӢи·Ң10%пјҢжӯЈ2е°ұжҳҜдёӢи·Ң20%пјӣеҰӮжһңеӨ§зӣӨиҰҒеӣһеҲ°еҺҹдҫҶй«ҳеәҰпјҢйңҖиҰҒдёҠжјІ1/0.9пјҚ1пјқ11.1%пјӣжӯЈ2еҚ»жңғдёҠжјІ1/0.8пјҚ1пјқ25%пјҢжҜ”еӨ§зӣӨзҡ„2еҖҚйӮ„иҰҒй«ҳгҖӮжүҖд»ҘиӮЎзҒҪжҷӮдёҖе®ҡжңғз”ЁжӯЈ2жҠ„еә•пјҢеӣ зӮәеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёдёҚжңғжӯёйӣ¶пјҢи·Ңеҫ—ж·ұе°ұеҪҲеҫ—й«ҳгҖӮ

зӣ®еүҚеңӢе…§жңү4жӘ”жӯЈ2еһӢETFпјҢи©ІжҖҺйәјйҒёе•Ҡпјҹз•¶з„¶жҳҜжҢ‘йҒёе ұй…¬зҺҮжңҖй«ҳгҖҒй•·жңҹжҢҒжңүжҲҗжң¬жңҖдҪҺзҡ„00685LгҖӮ00685Lеӣ зӮәеӨӘжңғжјІпјҢиӮЎеғ№и¶…йҒҺ300е…ғпјҢдёҖејөиҰҒ30иҗ¬жңүй»һиІҙгҖӮзӮәдәҶи®“е°ҸиіҮж—ҸиІ ж“”еҫ—иө·пјҢ00685Lе•ҹеӢ•гҖҢ1жӢҶ24гҖҚзҡ„иӮЎзҘЁеҲҶеүІиЁҲз•«пјҢеҺҹжҢҒжңүиӮЎзҘЁзҡ„1ејөжңғи®ҠжҲҗ24ејөпјҢдҪҶжҳҜиӮЎеғ№д№ҹжңғи®ҠжҲҗ24еҲҶд№Ӣ1гҖӮ

д»ҠеӨ©жҳҜ7/7пјҢ00685LеҲҶеүІеҫҢйҮҚж–°дёҠеёӮпјҢ1ејөеҸӘиҰҒ1иҗ¬еӨҡпјҢжҳҜжүҖжңүеҠ ж¬ҠжӯЈ2дёӯжңҖдҪҺзҡ„пјҒжӯЈ2еһӢETFзҡ„жіўеӢ•зўәеҜҰжҜ”ијғеӨ§пјҢдҪҶжҳҜгҖҢи·Ңеҫ—ж·ұпјҢеҪҲеҫ—й«ҳгҖҚзҡ„зү№й»һд№ҹеҫҲиҝ·дәәгҖӮеҰӮжһңжҳҜжІ’жңүж“ҚдҪңйҒҺжӯЈ2зҡ„жңӢеҸӢпјҢе»әиӯ°е…Ҳз”Ёе°ҸйҮҸиіҮйҮ‘йҖІе ҙпјҢзӯүеҲ°зҶҹжӮүй«ҳжіўеӢ•зҡ„зү№жҖ§еҫҢпјҢеҶҚдёҖжӯҘжӯҘзҡ„еўһеҠ иіҮйҮ‘гҖӮ

жӯЈ2еҸҜд»Ҙй•·жңҹжҠ•иіҮе—Һпјҹи«ӢдҪ е•ҸдёҖдёӢиҮӘе·ұпјҢеҰӮжһңдҪ зӣёдҝЎеҸ°зҒЈиӮЎеёӮй•·жңҹеҫҖдёҠпјҢзӮәдҪ•дёҚиІ·жӯЈ2дҫҶиіәжӣҙеӨҡпјҹ

news.Title: гҖҠзҫҺиӮЎдё»йЎҢйҖұе ұгҖӢйӣ»з¶ІиЁӯеӮҷзҸҫд»ЈеҢ–вҖ”PWRгҖҒNVT
news.Content:
MoneyDJж–°иҒһ 2026-07-07 13:59:15 ж•ёдҪҚе…§е®№дёӯеҝғ зҷјдҪҲ

Quanta ServicesпјҲPWR.USпјү

иҝ‘жңҹQuanta ServicesиҲҮHyosung HICOжҲҗз«ӢHYOSUNG HICO BREAKER, LLCпјҢе°ҮеңЁзҫҺеңӢиі“е·һCanonsburgе» з”ҹз”ў72.5kVиҮі800kVж°Јй«”ж–·и·ҜеҷЁпјҢдёҰе»¶дјёиҮій«ҳеЈ“зӣҙжөҒијёйӣ»пјҲHVDCпјүжҠҖиЎ“гҖӮйҖҷж¬ЎеӢ•дҪңжҠҠе…¬еҸёиҲҮзҫҺеңӢй«ҳеЈ“иЁӯеӮҷжң¬ең°еҢ–дҫӣжҮүйҸҲзӣҙжҺҘйҖЈзөҗгҖӮ

nVent ElectricпјҲNVT.USпјү

пјҠе°ҸжҸҗйҶ’пјҡжң¬ж–Үе…§е®№зӮәеҲ©з”ЁAIж•ёдҪҚе·Ҙе…·е»Јжіӣи’җзҫ…гҖҒеҪҷж•ҙе…Ёзҗғеҗ„ең°ж–°иҒһиҲҮеӨҡе…ғиіҮиЁҠиҮӘеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗпјҢеғ…дҫӣиіҮиЁҠеҸғиҖғд№Ӣз”ЁпјҢдёҚж§ӢжҲҗд»»дҪ•еҪўејҸзҡ„жҠ•иіҮе»әиӯ°гҖҒиҰҒзҙ„жҲ–жүҝи«ҫпјҢи®ҖиҖ…жҮүзҚЁз«ӢеҲӨж–·гҖҒеҜ©ж…Һи©•дј°пјҢдёҰиҮӘиІ жҠ•иіҮжҗҚзӣҠеҸҠзӣёй—ңйўЁйҡӘгҖӮ

news.Title: д»Ҡж—ҘеҸ°иӮЎгҖӢеҸ°иӮЎзӣӨдёӯи»ҹи…іпјҒзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң1077й»һгҖҖеҸ°з©Қйӣ»ж”¶д»Ҡж—ҘжңҖдҪҺеғ№2440е…ғ
news.Content:
д»Ҡж—ҘеҖӢиӮЎжҲҗдәӨйҮҸжҺ’иЎҢжҰңеүҚдә”еҗҚпјҡзҫӨеүөгҖҒеҸӢйҒ”гҖҒж–°зә–гҖҒдёӯзҹіеҢ–гҖҒеҠӣз©Қйӣ»

д»Ҡж—ҘеҖӢиӮЎжҲҗдәӨеҖјжҺ’иЎҢжҰңеүҚдә”еҗҚпјҡеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖҒеңӢе·Ё*гҖҒзҫӨеүөгҖҒж¬ЈиҲҲгҖҒеҚ—дәһз§‘

еҸ°еҢ—иӮЎеёӮд»ҠпјҲ7пјүж—ҘеҶҚеәҰйңҮзӣӘпјҢд»Ҙ46,700.42й»һзӣӨдёҠй–ӢеҮәпјҢжңҖй«ҳдҫҶеҲ°46,967.04й»һпјҢдёҚйҒҺжҺҘиҝ‘еҚҲзӣӨйҒҮеҲ°иіЈеЈ“иҘІж“ҠпјҢйҡЁеҫҢи·іж°ҙзҝ»й»‘пјҢжңҖдҪҺдҫҶеҲ°45,432.02й»һпјҢдёҠдёӢйңҮзӣӘ1,535.02й»һпјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң1,077.28й»һпјҲзҙ„2.31%пјүпјҢж”¶еңЁ45,479.11й»һпјҢеӨұе®Ҳ46,000й»һпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸзӮә1.16е…Ҷе…ғгҖӮ

дёӯе°ҸеһӢиӮЎиіЈеЈ“жӣҙйҮҚпјҢд»Ҙ439.63й»һзӣӨдёҠй–ӢеҮәеҫҢз«ӢеҚізҝ»й»‘пјҢжңҖдҪҺдҫҶеҲ°418.45й»һпјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң20.33й»һпјҲзҙ„4.62%пјүпјҢж”¶еңЁ419.47й»һпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸзӮә2,736.96е„„е…ғгҖӮ

ж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎй–Ӣй«ҳиө°дҪҺпјҢж¬ҠзҺӢеҸ°з©Қйӣ»еҠӣе®Ҳзҙ…зӣӨпјҢд»Ҙ2,480е…ғзӣӨдёҠй–ӢеҮәеҫҢпјҢзӣӨдёӯжңҖй«ҳдҫҶеҲ°2,500е…ғпјҢдёҚйҒҺе°ҫзӣӨд»ҚдёҚж•өиІ·еЈ“пјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң20е…ғпјҲзҙ„0.81%пјүпјҢж”¶еңЁд»Ҡж—ҘжңҖдҪҺеғ№2.440е…ғпјҢжӢ–зҙҜеӨ§зӣӨжҢҮж•ёе°ұжңү155й»һпјӣиҒҜзҷјз§‘д»Ҡж—ҘйҷӨжҒҜ24.5е…ғпјҢйҷӨжҒҜеҸғиҖғеғ№4,100е…ғпјҢд»Ҙ4,200е…ғй–ӢеҮәпјҢй–ӢзӣӨеҚіе®ҢжҲҗеЎ«жҒҜпјҢеҜ«дёӢжӯ·дҫҶз¬¬4ж¬ЎдёҖж—ҘеЎ«жҒҜзҙҖйҢ„пјҢдёҚйҒҺеҚҲзӣӨйҒӯйҒҮиіЈеЈ“иҘІж“Ҡзҝ»й»‘пјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң70е…ғпјҲзҙ„1.71%пјүпјҢж”¶еңЁ4,030е…ғпјӣеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»еҗҢжЁЈй–Ӣй«ҳиө°дҪҺпјҢзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң105е…ғпјҲзҙ„5.26%пјүпјҢж”¶еңЁ1,890е…ғгҖӮ

>> з«ӢеҚіз·ҡдёҠй–ӢиӯүеҲёжҲ¶ <<

news.Title: HereвҖҷs Why EyePoint, Inc. (EYPT) Is Among the Best Get Rich Quick Stocks
news.Content:
EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ: EYPT ) is among the best get rich quick stocks to buy right now . Andreas Argyrides, an analyst at Chardan, significantly lifted the price target on EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) to $65 from $29 on July 1. Calling the company "a de-risked, single-asset, catalyst-rich story," the firm maintained a Buy rating on the shares following a transfer of coverage.

The firm expects readouts from Phase 3 studies of DURAVYU in wet AMD, scheduled for August and October 2026, to be the key catalysts. The two biggest retinal markets, wet AMD and DME, are anticipated to achieve $13 billion in U.S. sales next year, the firm said.

Phovoir/Shutterstock.com

In one year, EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) has returned twice as much as the market, with nearly 25% outperformance. Overall, the company has a Buy rating from all twelve analysts covering the stock. With an upside potential of 153.93% based on the one-year median price target of $35.50, EYPT is among the best get rich quick stocks to buy right now.

EyePoint, Inc. (NASDAQ:EYPT) is a Massachusetts-based company specializing in therapeutics for people living with serious retinal diseases. The company's pipeline is built on its proprietary bioerodible Durasert E technology.

While we acknowledge the potential of EYPT as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

news.Title: Better Defense Stock to Own in 2026: PLTR vs. LMT
news.Content:
The defense trade of the past few years has split into two stories. One is about software -- the code that turns a flood of sensor data into a targeting decision. The other is about steel -- the interceptors, aircraft, and factories that fill a shooting war's shopping list.

Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) owns the first story. Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) owns the second. Both are winning work, and the contrast between them says a lot about where defense budgets are heading in 2026.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

What Palantir is doing in defense

Palantir has moved from a data vendor to the decision layer of the U.S. and allied militaries. Its Maven Smart System is built on the company's Artificial Intelligence Platform, which sifts sensor feeds and flags targets, and the Pentagon made it an official program of record in 2026.

That status matters because it signals lasting, budgeted demand rather than a pilot that could vanish. The Army folded some 75 separate contracts into a single enterprise agreement with a $10 billion ceiling over 10 years, the largest deal in the company's history, and both NATO and the U.K. have signed on for their own Maven deployments. Palantir is embedding itself as the software spine that other systems plug into, a durable place to sit as warfare becomes software-defined.

What Lockheed Martin is doing in defense

Lockheed Martin is building the hardware as needed. The center of gravity is the Golden Dome, the national missile shield that has become the defining U.S. defense program of the decade.

Lockheed landed a $35.5 billion award to produce THAAD interceptors, agreed to triple PAC-3 output and quadruple THAAD production under multiyear deals, and won prototype work on space-based interceptors designed to strike missiles after launch. Around the shield, the company keeps upgrading the F-35 with new sensors and electronic warfare capabilities, pairs the jet with autonomous drone wingmen, and pushes ahead with hypersonic weapons. It closed 2025 with a backlog of nearly $194 billion, more than two and a half years of sales on the books at the year's start.

The case for each defense stock, and the risks

Palantir's momentum is real, and its software could ride every platform in the field. The catch is that the stock trades at a level that assumes years of flawless growth, so a single quarter that misses the bar can punish the shares. It sells software into budgets that fund hardware first, which caps how large the defense slice can grow in a given year.

Story Continues

Lockheed carries its own scars. It lost the next-generation fighter contract to a rival, its fixed-price programs have a history of cost overruns, and the space-interceptor race for the Golden Dome includes a dozen competitors chasing the same dollars.

Neither name is a clean bet, and an investor should weigh the flaws in both before choosing.

The better defense stock to own in 2026

The tiebreaker for me is what 2026 funds. The money in this budget cycle flows to the missile shield and the magazines of interceptors behind it, and Lockheed Martin sits at the center of both, with multiyear contracts and a backlog that turns today's headlines into years of booked revenue.

Palantir may prove the better business over a longer arc, and its software keeps spreading across the same programs Lockheed builds. For the year ahead, though, the visibility of funded programs and the price an investor pays to own them tilt the decision toward the hardware maker.

Palantir is also caught up in the broader AI trade, where any stock with an artificial intelligence story gets bid higher on the theme rather than the results underneath it. That link cuts both ways: If sentiment around AI names cools, Palantir could sell off alongside them even if its defense contracts keep landing on schedule.

This means Lockheed Martin is the better defense stock to own in 2026, with Palantir as the one to watch as the software layer continues to grow. Investors who want defense exposure with a clear line of sight into next year's revenue have the stronger setup in Lockheed. Those who buy Palantir should size their positions to its valuation and treat the swings as the cost of admission.

и·Ңе№…еүҚ5еҗҚеҖӢиӮЎзӮәеҜҢйӮҰиҳӢжһңжӯЈдәҢNгҖҒзҹҪж јгҖҒжҰ®з§‘гҖҒеҚ—дәһгҖҒж—Ҙйӣ»иІҝгҖӮ1150707

news.Title: йҹ“иӮЎжӢ–зҙҜпјҒеҸ°иӮЎгҖҢзҙ…зҝ»й»‘гҖҚж”¶зӣӨйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫеҚғй»һгҖҖеҸ°з©Қйӣ»ж”¶2440е…ғ
news.Content:
еҚіжҷӮдёӯеҝғпјҸз¶ңеҗҲе ұе°Һ

еҚҡйҖҡе’Ңе…¶д»–жҷ¶зүҮиӮЎй җиЁҲз¬¬дәҢеӯЈиІЎе ұеӯЈе°Үеј·еӢҒжҲҗй•·пјҢжҠ•иіҮиҖ…зҙӣзҙӣйҮҚж–°иІ·йҖІпјҢжҺЁеӢ•зҫҺиӮЎйҖұдёҖе…Ёйқўж”¶й«ҳгҖӮеҸ°иӮЎд»ҠпјҲ7пјүж—Ҙж—©зӣӨдҫҶеҲ°46,967.04й»һгҖҒдёҠжјІ410.65й»һпјҢз„¶иҖҢдёүжҳҹиІЎе ұи§ёзҷјзҚІеҲ©дәҶзөҗпјҢеҚ—йҹ“KOSPIйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫ8пј…пјҢйҖЈеё¶жӢ–зҙҜдәһиӮЎдёӢж®әпјӣеҸ°з©Қйӣ»дёҚж•өиіЈеЈ“жҮүиҒІзҝ»й»‘пјҢиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶гҖҒе°Ғжё¬гҖҒеҠҹзҺҮе…ғд»¶гҖҒзҹҪжҷ¶ең“зӯүзҶұй–ҖйЎҢжқҗдёҖзүҮж…ҳз¶ гҖӮзөӮе ҙжҢҮж•ёж”¶еңЁ45,479.11й»һгҖҒдёӢи·Ң1,077.28й»һпјҢи·Ңе№…2.31пј…пјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸ1е…Ҷ1,696.26е„„е…ғгҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»пјҲ2330пјүзөӮе ҙдёӢи·Ң20е…ғгҖҒж”¶еңЁ2,440е…ғгҖӮ

йӣ»еӯҗж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎж–№йқўпјҢйҙ»жө·пјҲ2317пјүж”¶еңЁ237е…ғпјҢи·Ң5е…ғпјӣиҒҜзҷјз§‘пјҲ2454пјүж”¶4,030е…ғпјҢдёӢи·Ң70е…ғпјӣе»ЈйҒ”пјҲ2382пјүж”¶373е…ғпјҢи·Ң5е…ғпјӣеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»пјҲ2308пјүд»Ҙ1,890е…ғдҪңж”¶пјҢи·Ң105е…ғпјӣж—ҘжңҲе…үжҠ•жҺ§пјҲ3711пјүи·Ң28е…ғпјҢж”¶651е…ғпјӣиҒҜйӣ»пјҲ2303пјүдёӢи·Ң11е…ғпјҢж”¶155е…ғпјӣеӨ§з«Ӣе…үпјҲ3008пјүж”¶еңЁ3,890е…ғпјҢдёӢж»‘245е…ғгҖӮ

йҮ‘иһҚж–№йқўпјҢеҜҢйӮҰйҮ‘пјҲ2881пјүж”¶еңЁ123е…ғпјҢжјІ1.5е…ғпјӣеңӢжі°йҮ‘пјҲ2882пјүдёҠжјІ3.6е…ғпјҢж”¶еңЁ97е…ғпјӣдёӯдҝЎйҮ‘пјҲ2891пјүд»Ҙ70.2е…ғдҪңж”¶пјҢдёӢи·Ң1.2е…ғпјӣе…ҶиұҗйҮ‘пјҲ2886пјүж”¶еңЁ46.8е…ғпјҢжјІ0.5е…ғпјӣиҸҜеҚ—йҮ‘пјҲ2880пјүжјІ0.7е…ғпјҢж”¶38.95е…ғпјӣз¬¬дёҖйҮ‘пјҲ2892пјүж”¶33.3е…ғпјҢжјІ0.25е…ғпјӣеҗҲеә«йҮ‘пјҲ5880пјүе°ҸжјІ0.05е…ғпјҢд»Ҙ24.9е…ғдҪңж”¶гҖӮ

д»Ҡж—ҘжҲҗдәӨйҮҸеүҚ10еҗҚеҖӢиӮЎдҫқеәҸзӮәзҫӨеүөгҖҒеҸӢйҒ”гҖҒж–°зә–гҖҒдёӯзҹіеҢ–гҖҒеҠӣз©Қйӣ»гҖҒиҸҜйӮҰйӣ»гҖҒеҮұеҹәйҮ‘гҖҒеҚ—иҢӮгҖҒиҒҜйӣ»гҖҒеҸ°ж–°ж–°е…үйҮ‘гҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢжјІе№…еүҚдә”еҗҚзӮәеә·йңҲ*гҖҒе»әзўҒгҖҒжҚ·ж•Ҹ-KYгҖҒжјўеә·-KYеүөгҖҒз‘һзҘәйӣ»йҖҡпјӣиҮіж–ји·Ңе№…еүҚдә”еҗҚеүҮзӮәзҹҪж јгҖҒеҚ—дәһгҖҒе®Ҹж—ӯ-KYгҖҒжҳ жі°гҖҒеӨ§жҜ…гҖӮ

гҖҠж°‘иҰ–ж–°иҒһз¶ІгҖӢжҸҗйҶ’жӮЁпјҡе…§е®№еғ…дҫӣеҸғиҖғпјҢжҠ•иіҮдәәж–јжұәзӯ–жҷӮжҮүеҜ©ж…Һи©•дј°йўЁйҡӘпјҢдёҰе°ұжҠ•иіҮзөҗжһңиҮӘиЎҢиІ иІ¬гҖӮ

еҺҹж–ҮеҮәиҷ•пјҡ еҝ«ж–°иҒһпјҸйҹ“иӮЎжӢ–зҙҜпјҒеҸ°иӮЎгҖҢзҙ…зҝ»й»‘гҖҚж”¶зӣӨйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫеҚғй»һ еҸ°з©Қйӣ»ж”¶2440е…ғ

news.Title: еҸ°иӮЎеҸҲйҒӯиЎҖжҙ—пјҒж”¶зӣӨдёӢж®ә1077й»һ еҸ°з©Қйӣ»иӢҰж’җжҢ«дҪҺ20е…ғ
news.Content:
еҸ°иӮЎд»ҠпјҲ7ж—ҘпјүеҸҲеҮәзҸҫеҠҮзғҲйңҮзӣӘпјҢеҚҲзӣӨйҒҺеҫҢи·іж°ҙйҮҚжҢ«йҖҫеҚғй»һпјҢй«ҳдҪҺйңҮзӣӘйҒ”1535.02й»һпјҢжңҖзөӮж”¶еңЁ45479.11й»һпјҢдёӢи·Ң1077.28й»һпјҢж”№еҜ«еҸІдёҠз¬¬е…«еӨ§и·Ңй»һгҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»и·Ң20е…ғж”¶еңЁ2440е…ғпјҢиҒҜзҷјз§‘дёӢж®ә70е…ғж”¶еңЁ4030е…ғпјҢеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»жҢ«дҪҺ105е…ғж”¶еңЁ1890е…ғпјҢйҙ»жө·д№ҹи·ҢйҖҫ2%пјҢдё»иҰҒж—ҸзҫӨдёҖзүҮз¶ жІ№жІ№пјҢйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎзӮәж’җзӣӨз„Ұй»һгҖӮ

еҸ°иӮЎж—©зӣӨдёҖеәҰдёҠжјІи¶…йҒҺ400й»һпјҢжңӘж–ҷеҚҲзӣӨиұ¬зҫҠи®ҠиүІпјҢзҝ»й»‘еҫҢйӣЈж“ӢиіЈеЈ“пјҢзҙ„иҺ«дёӯеҚҲ12й»һ30еҲҶе·ҰеҸійҮҚжҢ«и¶…йҒҺеҚғй»һпјҢжңҖдҪҺи§ёеҸҠ45432.02й»һпјҢеҺҹе…Ҳз©©зӣӨзҡ„еҸ°з©Қйӣ»зҝ»й»‘пјҢеӨ§еһӢж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»иҲҮиҒҜзҷјз§‘и·Ңе№…ж“ҙеӨ§гҖӮ

зҶұй–Җж—ҸзҫӨиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶йҒӯжӢӢе”®пјҢеңӢе·Ёзӯү9жӘ”жҰӮеҝөиӮЎиў«жү“е…Ҙи·ҢеҒңпјҢијүжқҝPCBж—ҸзҫӨжҢҒзәҢејұеӢўпјҢж¬ЈиҲҲжҡҙи·Ңи¶…йҒҺ8%пјҢйҮ‘еғҸйӣ»дёӢи·Ңиҝ‘7%пјҢжҷҜзў©иҗҪе…Ҙи·ҢеҒңеғ№гҖӮзҶұй–ҖиӮЎеӨ§з«Ӣе…үдёӢж®әйҖҫ6%пјҢзҫӨеүөиҲҮеҸӢйҒ”д№ҹи·ҢйҖҫ7%гҖӮ

дёүжҳҹйӣ–й–ӢеҮәдә®зңјиІЎе ұпјҢQ2иіәиҙҸйҒҺеҺ»дёүе№ҙзёҪе’ҢпјҢдҪҶеёӮе ҙдёҚиІ·е–®пјҢеҲ©еӨҡеҮәзӣЎиӮЎеғ№йҮҚжҢ«пјҢиЁҳжҶ¶й«”еҗҢжӯҘиө°дҪҺпјҢеҚ—дәһз§‘дёӢи·Ңиҝ‘4%пјҢзҫӨиҒҜйҮҚж‘”йҖҫ6%пјҢиҸҜйӮҰйӣ»дёӢи·Ңи¶…йҒҺ4%пјҢж—әе®Ҹи·ҢйҖҫ4%пјҢеЁҒеүӣд№ҹдёӢи·Ң2%гҖӮ

йҮқе°ҚеҸ°иӮЎеҫҢеёӮпјҢе·Ҙе•Ҷе ұе°ҺпјҢжі•дәәжҢҮеҮәпјҢдёҠеҚҠе№ҙеҸ°иӮЎйЈҶжјІ59.25%пјҢ7жңҲжӯЈйқўиҮЁжҠ•иіҮдҝЎеҝғгҖҒиіҮйҮ‘еӢ•иғҪеҸҠAIе»әиЁӯзҷјеұ•зӯүдёүйҒ“еЈ“еҠӣжё¬и©ҰпјҢе°ҺиҮҙжјІеӨҡжӢүеӣһж•ҙзҗҶпјҢй җж–ҷиҰҒзӯүеҲ°еңӢе…§еӨ–еӨ§е’–жі•иӘӘжңғгҖҒиІЎе ұе…¬еёғпјҢзӮәеҫҢзәҢеўһй•·еҠӣйҒ“е®ҡиӘҝпјҢжүҚжңғжңүйҖІдёҖжӯҘиЎЁзҸҫз©әй–“гҖӮ

еҖјеҫ—з•ҷж„Ҹзҡ„жҳҜпјҢеӨ–иіҮиіЈи¶…дёҚеҒңпјҢеҠ дёҠзҫҺе…ғжҢҮж•ёиө°жҸҡпјҢдәһе№ЈжҳЁпјҲ6ж—Ҙпјүе…ЁйғҪиө°иІ¶пјҢж–°еҸ°е№ЈиІ¶з ҙ32е…ғеӨ§й—ңпјҢжңҖдҪҺдҫҶеҲ°32.079е…ғпјҢзқҪйҒ•дёүеҖӢжңҲйҮҚиҝ”32е…ғеғ№дҪҚпјҢеёӮе ҙиіҮйҮ‘жөҒеҗ‘зҫҺе…ғиіҮз”ўпјҢдё”7жңҲйҷӨж¬ҠжҒҜж—әеӯЈпјҢй җжңҹеӨ–иіҮеҢҜеҮәеҠӣйҒ“дёҚжңғжёӣејұгҖӮ

news.Title: еҸ°иӮЎж”¶и·Ң1077й»һпјҒй«ҳдҪҺзӣёе·®1535й»һгҖҖжі•дәәзңӢеҘҪйҖҷдәӣж—ҸзҫӨ
news.Content: зҫҺиӮЎеҸҚеҪҲпјҢеҸ°иӮЎд»Ҡж—©еҺҹжң¬д№ҹи·ҹи‘—еҸҚж”»пјҢдёҠжјІ410й»һпјҢдҪҶйҡЁи‘—йҹ“ж—ҘиӮЎеёӮдёҖи·Ҝиө°дҪҺпјҢеҸ°иӮЎд№ҹз”ұзҙ…зҝ»й»‘пјҢдёҖеәҰеӨ§и·Ң1124й»һиҮі45432й»һпјҢй«ҳдҪҺй»һдҫҶеӣһзӣёе·®1535й»һгҖӮзөӮе ҙд»ҚдёӢи·Ң1077й»һпјҢжҳҜжӯ·еҸІе–®ж—Ҙж”¶зӣӨз¬¬8еӨ§и·Ңй»һпјҢжҢҮж•ёж”¶еңЁ45479й»һпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸ1е…Ҷ1696е„„е…ғгҖӮ йӣ»еӯҗиӮЎд»ҠеӨ©еј•й ҳи·ҢеӢўпјҢеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»дёӢи·Ң5.2пј…пјҢйҙ»жө·гҖҒиҸҜзў©йғҪи·ҢйҖҫ2пј…пјӣе…ҲеүҚеј·еӢўзҡ„еҸ°еЎ‘йӣҶеңҳпјҢд»ҠеӨ©д№ҹжӢүеӣһйҮҚжҢ«пјҢйҖЈе…©еӨ©иө°ејұпјӣзӣёе°Қең°пјҢйҮ‘жҺ§иӮЎжҢәиә«иҖҢеҮәпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬еңӢжі°йҮ‘гҖҒеҮұеҹәйҮ‘жјІе№…йғҪи¶…йҒҺ3пј…гҖӮ дёҚйҒҺпјҢжі•дәәеңҲд»ҚжЁӮи§ҖзңӢеҫ…дёӢеҚҠе№ҙиЎҢжғ…пјҢеӨ§иҸҜе„ӘеҲ©й«ҳеЎ«жҒҜ30ETF(00918) з¶“зҗҶдәәйғӯдҝ®иӘ иЎЁзӨәпјҢйҡЁи‘—е…ЁзҗғAIдјәжңҚеҷЁйңҖжұӮжҢҒзәҢзҒ«зҶұпјҢеҠ дёҠйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎд»Ҡе№ҙзҚІеҲ©иҲҮиӮЎеҲ©зҷјж”ҫдә®зңјпјҢеҸ°иӮЎз¬¬дёүеӯЈй–ӢеұҖйҰ–ж—ҘеҚіиҝҺдҫҶеӨҡй ӯиіҮйҮ‘еј·еҠӣж”Ҝж’җпјҢжЁӮи§ҖзңӢеҫ…дёӢеҚҠе№ҙиЎҢжғ…гҖӮ йғӯдҝ®иӘ жҢҮеҮәпјҢдёӢеҚҠе№ҙеҸ°иӮЎеҹәжң¬йқўиҲҮиіҮйҮ‘йқўйӣҷи»Ңе…ұжҢҜпјҢе»әиӯ°жҠ•иіҮдәәйҖўдҪҺеёғеұҖгҖҒеҒҸеӨҡж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ пҪһAIзЎ¬й«”з„ЎеҸҜжӣҝд»Јпјҡ иҸҜзў©гҖҒе»ЈйҒ”гҖҒз·Ҝз©Һзӯүж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎеҸ—жғ GB200зӯүж–°дё–д»ЈдјәжңҚеҷЁйҷёзәҢйҮҸз”ўпјҢдёӢеҚҠе№ҙзҮҹж”¶е°ҮиҝҺдҫҶзҲҶзҷјжңҹгҖӮ пҪһйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎзҚІеҲ©еҹәеә•зҙ®еҜҰпјҡ еӨ–иіҮиҲҮй«ҳиӮЎжҒҜиіҮйҮ‘з©ҚжҘөеӣһжөҒдҪҺжң¬зӣҠжҜ”гҖҒй«ҳж®–еҲ©зҺҮзҡ„е„ӘиіӘйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎпјҢе…·еӮҷдёӢжӘ”ж”Ҝж’җеҠӣйҒ“гҖӮ пҪһйҷӨж¬ҠжҒҜиіҮйҮ‘иЎҢжғ…пјҡ й«ҳиӮЎжҒҜETFиҰҸжЁЎжҢҒзәҢж“ҙеӨ§пјҢжҲҗеҲҶиӮЎиӘҝж•ҙеё¶еӢ•зҡ„иў«еӢ•иіҮйҮ‘жөҒе…ҘпјҢе°ҮйҖІдёҖжӯҘжҺЁеҚҮзӣёй—ңеҖӢиӮЎзҡ„и©•еғ№иҲҮиӮЎеғ№иЎЁзҸҫгҖӮ 00935йҮҺжқ‘иҮәзҒЈеүөж–°з§‘жҠҖ50 ETFеҹәйҮ‘з¶“зҗҶдәәжһ—жҖЎеҗӣжҢҮеҮәпјҢAIжҠ•иіҮдё»и»ёе·Іеҫһе–®дёҖжҷ¶зүҮжҲ–е–®дёҖдјҒжҘӯпјҢйҖҗжӯҘж“ҙеұ•иҮіе®Ңж•ҙдҫӣжҮүйҸҲпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬е…ҲйҖІиЈҪзЁӢгҖҒе…ҲйҖІе°ҒиЈқгҖҒASICгҖҒй«ҳйҖҹдә’йҖЈгҖҒж¶ІеҶ·ж•ЈзҶұгҖҒй«ҳеЈ“дҫӣйӣ»еҸҠз¶ІйҖҡиЁӯеӮҷзӯүй ҳеҹҹпјҢйғҪе°ҮеҸ—жғ ж–јAIжҺЁи«–жҷӮд»ЈдҫҶиҮЁгҖӮAIз”ўжҘӯзҡ„еҸ—жғ зҜ„еңҚжӯЈеҫһгҖҢдёҖе®¶е…¬еҸёгҖҚж“ҙеӨ§еҲ°гҖҢдёҖж•ҙжўқдҫӣжҮүйҸҲгҖҚпјҢжҠ•иіҮйҮҚй»һд№ҹеҫһжҢ‘йҒёжҳҺжҳҹеҖӢиӮЎпјҢйҖҗжӯҘиҪүеҗ‘еёғеұҖе®Ңж•ҙAIз”ҹж…Ӣзі»гҖӮ йҡЁи‘—AIиіҮж–ҷдёӯеҝғжҢҒзәҢеҚҮзҙҡпјҢе…·еӮҷжҠҖиЎ“й–ҖжӘ»гҖҒжҢҒзәҢжҠ•е…Ҙз ”зҷјдёҰжҺҢжҸЎй—ңйҚөдҫӣжҮүйҸҲең°дҪҚзҡ„дјҒжҘӯпјҢеҸҜжңӣжҢҒзәҢеҸ—жғ з”ўжҘӯй•·жңҹжҲҗй•·и¶ЁеӢўгҖӮ йҮҺжқ‘жҠ•дҝЎзӯ–з•ҘжҡЁиЎҢйҠ·иҷ•дё»з®Ўејөз№јж–ҮиЎЁзӨәпјҢеҸ°иӮЎзҹӯжңҹд»ҚеҸҜиғҪеҸ—еҲ°ж”ҝзӯ–йқўжҲ–еёӮе ҙжғ…з·’еҪұйҹҝиҖҢжіўеӢ•пјҢдҪҶAIй•·з·ҡзҷјеұ•и¶ЁеӢўдёҰжңӘж”№и®ҠгҖӮйҡЁи‘—AIжҮүз”ЁжҢҒзәҢж“ҙеұ•пјҢеҸ—жғ зҜ„еңҚе·Із”ұе°‘ж•ёж¬ҠеҖјиӮЎе»¶дјёиҮіе®Ңж•ҙдҫӣжҮүйҸҲпјҢеӣ жӯӨжҠ•иіҮеёғеұҖдёҚе®ңеҸӘиҒҡз„Ұе–®дёҖеҖӢиӮЎпјҢиҖҢжҮүжҺҢжҸЎж•ҙй«”AIеғ№еҖјйҸҲзҡ„жҲҗй•·ж©ҹжңғгҖӮ 00935иҝҪи№ӨиҮәзҒЈеүөж–°з§‘жҠҖ50жҢҮж•ёпјҢйҷӨеёғеұҖеҸ°з©Қйӣ»гҖҒиҒҜзҷјз§‘гҖҒеҸ°йҒ”йӣ»зӯүAIж ёеҝғдјҒжҘӯеӨ–пјҢжӣҙж¶өи“ӢICиЁӯиЁҲгҖҒе…ҲйҖІе°ҒиЈқгҖҒж•ЈзҶұгҖҒйӣ»жәҗеҸҠй«ҳйҖҹеӮіијёзӯүй—ңйҚөдҫӣжҮүйҸҲпјҢдёҰйҰ–еүөе°ҮгҖҢз ”зҷјиІ»з”ЁгҖҚзҙҚе…ҘйҒёиӮЎж©ҹеҲ¶пјҢиҒҡз„Ұе…·еӮҷжҢҒзәҢеүөж–°иғҪеҠӣиҲҮй•·жңҹз«¶зҲӯе„ӘеӢўзҡ„з§‘жҠҖдјҒжҘӯпјҢжҺҢжҸЎAIй•·з·ҡжҲҗй•·еҘ‘ж©ҹгҖӮ еұ•жңӣжң¬е‘ЁпјҢеёӮе ҙе°ҮиҒҡз„ҰзҫҺеңӢй—ңзЁ…ж”ҝзӯ–еҫҢзәҢзҷјеұ•гҖҒзҫҺеңӢз¶“жҝҹж•ёж“ҡпјҢд»ҘеҸҠеҸ°з©Қйӣ»й җиЁҲ7жңҲ10ж—Ҙе…¬еёғ6жңҲзҮҹж”¶пјҢ7жңҲ16ж—ҘиҲүиЎҢз¬¬дәҢеӯЈжі•дәәиӘӘжҳҺжңғпјҢеёӮе ҙе°Үи—үжӯӨи§ҖеҜҹAIйңҖжұӮжҳҜеҗҰжҢҒзәҢеј·еӢҒпјҢд»ҘеҸҠдјҒжҘӯе°ҚдёӢеҚҠе№ҙиіҮжң¬ж”ҜеҮәиҲҮзҮҹйҒӢеұ•жңӣзҡ„зңӢжі•пјҢеҸҜжңӣжҲҗзӮәзүҪеӢ•еҸ°иӮЎеҸҠAIдҫӣжҮүйҸҲиө°еӢўзҡ„йҮҚиҰҒйўЁеҗ‘зҗғгҖӮ

news.Title: йӣ»еӯҗжјІеӨҡж—ҸзҫӨжҖҘжӢүеӣһгҖҒйҮ‘иһҚиӮЎзӣёе°Қеј·еӢўпјҢеҸ°иӮЎдёҠжј”жңҲз·ҡж”»йҳІжҲ°
news.Content:
гҖҗиІЎиЁҠеҝ«е ұпјҸж–№дәһз”ігҖ‘зҫҺиӮЎеңӢж…¶йҒҺеҫҢз¬¬дёҖеҖӢдәӨжҳ“ж—ҘеӣӣеӨ§жҢҮж•ёе…ЁйқўеҸҚеҪҲпјҢйҒ“з“ҠеҶҚеүөжӯ·еҸІж–°й«ҳпјҢиЎЁзҸҫзӣёз•¶еј·еӢўгҖӮдёҚйҒҺдәһжҙІиӮЎеёӮйҖұдәҢйҹ“иӮЎзӣӨдёӯйҮҚжҢ«иҝ‘8%гҖҒж—ҘиӮЎдәҰеӨ§и·ҢпјҢеҸ°иӮЎй–Ӣй«ҳж®әдҪҺеҫҢпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬жјІеӨҡзҡ„иў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶гҖҒиЁҳжҶ¶й«”гҖҒй«ҳеғ№иӮЎйҪҠеўЁпјҢеғ…йҮ‘иһҚиӮЎеҸҠйғЁеҲҶжҘӯзёҫиӮЎдёҠжјІпјҢзөӮе ҙеҠ ж¬ҠжҢҮж•ёеӨ§и·Ң1077.28й»һпјҢж”¶еңЁ45479.11й»һпјҢжҲҗдәӨйҮҸ1е…Ҷ1696.26е„„е…ғпјҢжҢҮж•ёи·Ңз ҙжңҲз·ҡпјҢиҪүејұеҸҜиғҪйңҖиҰҒйҖІиЎҢж•ҙзҗҶгҖӮзҫҺиӮЎ7жңҲйҖІе…ҘиІЎе ұе…¬еёғж—әеӯЈпјҢз”ұж–јжІ№еғ№дҪҺж–ј70зҫҺе…ғпјҢеҚҮжҒҜеЈ“еҠӣдёӢйҷҚпјҢжғҹеңЁеҖӢиӮЎијӘжөҒеӣһжӘ”дёӢпјҢз§‘жҠҖиӮЎиЎЁзҸҫијғејұеӢўпјҢи«ёеҰӮйЎһжҜ”ICиӮЎйғҪжңүдёҖе®ҡзЁӢеәҰдёӢи·ҢгҖӮеҖ’жҳҜз§‘жҠҖдёғйӣ„зҡ„и°·жӯҢгҖҒи¶…еҫ®гҖҒиӢұзү№зҲҫд»ҘеҸҠеҸ°з©Қйӣ»ADRйӮ„жҳҜзӣёе°Қеј·еӢўпјҢе…ҲеүҚеј·еӢўзҡ„иЁҳжҶ¶й«”зҫҺе…үгҖҒж–°еёқгҖҒеЁҒйЁ°иӮЎеғ№йғҪдёӢи·Ңи¶…йҒҺ15%д»ҘдёҠпјҢж¬Ўеј·ж—ҸзҫӨиЁӯеӮҷиӮЎжҮүжқҗгҖҒз§‘зЈҠзӯүи·Ңе№…д№ҹдёҚе°ҸпјҢе…¶д»–еҰӮе…үзә–иӮЎд№ҹжҳҜејұеӢўпјҢз”ІйӘЁж–Үе№ҫд№ҺеӣһеҲ°еҺҹй»һжңҖејұеӢўпјҢеҫ®и»ҹд№ҹжҳҜгҖӮеҖӢиӮЎиЎЁзҸҫдёҚеҗҢиӘҝпјҢдҪҶйҮ‘иһҚеҸҠзҮҹйҖ иӮЎиЎЁзҸҫеҚ»дёҚйҢҜпјҢжүҖд»ҘйҒ“з“Ҡеүөж–°й«ҳгҖӮзҹӯз·ҡдёҠеӣӣеӨ§жҢҮж•ёеҸӘиҰҒе®Ҳз©©жңҲз·ҡйӮ„з®—еј·еӢўгҖӮ

йҹ“еңӢжңҖеј·зҡ„дёүжҳҹеҸҠжө·еҠӣеЈ«еҸ—еҲ°жө·еҠӣеЈ«иҰҒеҺ»зҫҺеңӢзҷјиӮЎжҺӣзүҢпјҢе…©иҖ…иӮЎеғ№йғҪдёӢи·Ңи¶…йҒҺ7%пјҢдҪҝеҫ—жҢҮж•ёеӨ§и·Ңпјӣд№ҹеҪұйҹҝеҲ°ж—Ҙз¶“жҢҮж•ёпјҢиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶еҸҠе…үзә–иӮЎи·Ңе№…дёҚиј•гҖӮеҸӘжңүж–°еҠ еқЎиӮЎеёӮеүөй«ҳгҖӮ

еҸ°иӮЎжӯЈеҖјзҮҹж”¶е…¬еёғпјҢеүөжӯ·еҸІж–°й«ҳиҖ…дёҚе°‘пјҢдҪҶиғҪй…ҚеҗҲеҸҚжҮүеҰӮе·қж№–(2059)гҖҒзҮҹйӮҰ(3693)иҖ…е°‘пјҢдёҰйқһжүҖжңүеүөй«ҳиӮЎиӮЎеғ№йғҪжӯЈеҗ‘еҸҚжҮүпјҢеёӮе ҙе°Қж–јAIдҫӣжҮүйҸҲйӮ„жҳҜеҝғеӯҳе°ҸеҝғпјҢиҰҒзӯүзҫҺеңӢз§‘жҠҖеӯЈе ұе…¬еёғгҖӮи·Ңж·ұиӮЎCCLеҸ°е…үйӣ»(2383)зәҢи·ҢпјҢиў«еӢ•е…ғд»¶ж—ҸзҫӨеӨ§и·ҢпјҢзҰҫдјёе Ӯ(3026)гҖҒж—Ҙйӣ»иІҝ(3090)гҖҒиҲҲеӢӨ(2428)гҖҒиҸҜж–°з§‘(2492)и·ҢеҒңпјҢеңӢе·Ё*(2327)д№ҹеӨ§и·ҢпјӣиЁҳжҶ¶й«”зҡ„еҚ—дәһз§‘(2408)еҸҠиҸҜйӮҰйӣ»(2344)дәҰи·Ңпјӣе…үзә–иӮЎеғ…дёҠи©®(3363)ијғеј·пјҢе…¶д»–еҰӮиҒҜйҲһ(3450)гҖҒиЁҠиҠҜ-KY(6451)гҖҒе…үиҒ–(6442)гҖҒиҒҜдәһ(3081)гҖҒжіўиӢҘеЁҒ(3163)й–Ӣй«ҳиө°дҪҺгҖӮеёӮе ҙе°Қж–јеҸ°з©Қйӣ»(2330)16ж—Ҙжі•иӘӘжңғд»ҚжҠұд»Ҙжңҹеҫ…пјҢеҫһзҫҺиӮЎADRиө°еӢўијғзҫҺе…үгҖҒжҮүжқҗиЁӯеӮҷеҸҠе…үзә–иӮЎеј·еҸҜеҫ—зҹҘгҖӮеҸ°з©Қйӣ»еёӮе ҙзӣ®жЁҷеғ№и¶ҠиӘҝи¶Ҡй«ҳпјҢе·ІеҮәзҸҫи¶…йҒҺ5,000е…ғзӣ®жЁҷеғ№пјҢйӣ–йҖұдәҢй–Ӣй«ҳиө°дҪҺпјҢдҪҶе°ҮжҳҜеҸ°иӮЎдёӯжөҒз ҘжҹұгҖӮ

е…¶д»–иЈңжјІиӮЎијғеј·еҰӮз‘һжҳұ(2379)гҖҒиҒҜи© (3034)гҖҒжЁәжјў(6414)гҖҒз·Ҝз©Һ(6669)гҖҒзҹҪеүө(8016)гҖҒиІҝиҒҜ-KY(3665)гҖҒиӯңз‘һ-KY(4966)гҖҒз‘һзҘәйӣ»йҖҡ(6416)гҖҒйҷҪзЁӢ(3498)зӯүзӯүгҖӮ

news.Title: Where Will TMC The Metals Company Be By This Time Next Year?
news.Content:
TMC The Metals Company (NASDAQ: TMC) is a rare-earth metals play. That's a major area of interest today, as countries and companies worldwide seek to diversify their supply of these vital materials. There's just one small problem with the company as an investment: it is nowhere near producing any rare-earth metals. And one year from now, well, it probably won't be all that much closer.

The big story behind The Metals Company

China is the world's main supplier of rare-earth metals. The country has proven that it is willing to use access to rare-earth metals as a geopolitical bargaining chip. These metals are vital to the technology that drives the modern world, including within the defense sector. Sovereign nations simply can't afford to give so much power to China. This is why there's so much government support going to rare-earth metal producers.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue В»

The Metals Company is benefiting from this support. Notably, the U.S. government has pushed for changes to the process that would allow The Metals Company to obtain the permits it needs to build its planned mining operation. That should help accelerate the company's development. The U.S. is even working with Japan to speed the development of the entire industry niche in which The Metals Company operates.

The big problem is that The Metals Company wants to build a deep-sea mining operation . That's an extremely difficult task. And while the process is moving forward, the big achievement so far is that its permit application has been "formally certified by the U.S. National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA)." That's great and an important step, but really, all that's happened is that NOAA has received the application and said it was filled out correctly.

One year is not going to be enough time to build this business

When you step back and look at The Metals Company, it is a money-losing start-up. In one year, it will likely still be a money-losing start-up, since it hasn't even gotten the final OK to start building an undersea mine yet. This is a high-risk investment that only aggressive investors with a very long-term horizon should consider buying.

Most investors should probably watch this stock from a safe distance until it has a producing mine. More conservative types may even want to wait until the company is profitable. A year probably won't be enough time for either of those things to happen.
